55|6bbe96|    var wasmEnableWASI: Bool
56|d7c856|    var wasmDebugLogging: Bool
57|b4687f|    
58|1669c7|    init(language: ProgrammingLanguage = .python,
59|6a5d94|         pythonModuleMode: Bool = false,
60|c83907|         pythonUnbuffered: Bool = false,
61|2ffc54|         pythonOptimize: Bool = false,
62|67e9b4|         nodeInspect: Bool = false,
63|4f4fe5|         nodeInspectBrk: Bool = false,
64|b32c58|         nodeExperimentalModules: Bool = false,
65|cebd0b|         nodeNoWarnings: Bool = false,
66|130f52|         goRaceDetector: Bool = false,
67|d7fcca|         rustRelease: Bool = false,
68|9350a4|         wasmFunction: String = "main",
69|cea506|         wasmArgs: String = "",
70|85f8e4|         wasmEnableWASI: Bool = true,
71|e8df65|         wasmDebugLogging: Bool = false) {
72|cc7e71|        self.language = language
73|3aab51|        self.pythonModuleMode = pythonModuleMode
74|3d3481|        self.pythonUnbuffered = pythonUnbuffered
75|af91d2|        self.pythonOptimize = pythonOptimize
76|68f19b|        self.nodeInspect = nodeInspect
77|562e1e|        self.nodeInspectBrk = nodeInspectBrk
78|415dfc|        self.nodeExperimentalModules = nodeExperimentalModules
79|d9a841|        self.nodeNoWarnings = nodeNoWarnings
80|0948f9|        self.goRaceDetector = goRaceDetector
81|73c04b|        self.rustRelease = rustRelease
82|d2988d|        self.wasmFunction = wasmFunction
83|51df16|        self.wasmArgs = wasmArgs
84|118b79|        self.wasmEnableWASI = wasmEnableWASI
85|c9b664|        self.wasmDebugLogging = wasmDebugLogging
86|27e597|    }
87|b31277|}
88|adc83b|
89|04c9fb|enum ProgrammingLanguage: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Identifiable {
90|8d3f56|    case python = "Python"
91|90fe68|    case node = "Node.js"
92|6ba47a|    case go = "Go"
93|4db319|    case rust = "Rust"
94|a48bec|    case ruby = "Ruby"
95|b4892a|    case php = "PHP"
96|3db315|    case wasm = "WebAssembly"
97|da37f6|    case other = "Other"
98|b4687f|    
99|a5faf2|    var id: String { rawValue }
100|b4687f|    
101|4108d4|    var icon: String {
102|2e6d08|        switch self {
103|e07272|        case .python: return "🐍"
104|9c5f5e|        case .node: return "🟢"
105|690075|        case .go: return "🔵"
106|d7e45b|        case .rust: return "🦀"
107|93e904|        case .ruby: return "💎"
108|487745|        case .php: return "🐘"
109|7a3ca3|        case .wasm: return "⚡"
110|49b55c|        case .other: return "📄"
111|5f3077|        }
112|27e597|    }
113|b4687f|    
114|147dd7|    /// Detect language from file extension
115|cd92b0|    static func detect(from filePath: String?) -> ProgrammingLanguage {
116|7ea696|        guard let path = filePath else { return .other }
117|8c62fe|        let ext = (path as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
118|f60e4e|        switch ext {
119|75152b|        case "py": return .python
120|712ba2|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs": return .node
121|edae84|        case "go": return .go
122|714d49|        case "rs": return .rust
123|56dccc|        case "rb": return .ruby
124|e8bfcf|        case "php": return .php
125|63cc2e|        case "wasm": return .wasm
126|73aebd|        default: return .other
127|5f3077|        }
128|27e597|    }
129|b31277|}
130|adc83b|
131|f246bc|// MARK: - View Model
132|adc83b|
133|69d728|@MainActor
134|446ae1|class RunConfigViewModel: ObservableObject {
135|74f107|    @Published var currentConfig: RunConfiguration
136|9ebb16|    @Published var savedPresets: [RunConfiguration] = []
137|f87a06|    @Published var newArgText: String = ""
138|a0c267|    @Published var newEnvKey: String = ""
139|9eb621|    @Published var newEnvValue: String = ""
140|f04408|    @Published var presetNameText: String = ""
141|38d935|    @Published var showSaveAlert: Bool = false
142|93f263|    @Published var alertMessage: String = ""
143|1913b9|    @Published var isExecuting: Bool = false
144|7e90db|    @Published var executionOutput: String = ""
145|b4687f|    
146|6ee585|    private let presetsKey = "runConfigurationPresets"
147|b5a33c|    private var remoteRunner: RemoteRunner?
148|b4687f|    
149|37ec70|    init(remoteRunner: RemoteRunner? = nil) {
150|242c2d|        self.remoteRunner = remoteRunner
151|c7ea52|        self.currentConfig = RunConfiguration(name: "New Configuration")
152|8bbc24|        loadPresets()
153|27e597|    }
154|b4687f|    
155|a94ac5|    // MARK: - Command Line Arguments
156|b4687f|    
157|e873ad|    func addArgument() {
158|ea289f|        let trimmed = newArgText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
159|0eedd3|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { return }
160|cccd52|        currentConfig.commandLineArgs.append(trimmed)
161|4ed21b|        newArgText = ""
162|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
163|27e597|    }
164|b4687f|    
165|3fec38|    func removeArgument(at index: Int) {
166|c08fc6|        guard index >= 0 && index < currentConfig.commandLineArgs.count else { return }
167|9cbe01|        currentConfig.commandLineArgs.remove(at: index)
168|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
169|27e597|    }
170|b4687f|    
171|2ac63f|    func moveArgument(from source: IndexSet, to destination: Int) {
172|9497ba|        currentConfig.commandLineArgs.move(fromOffsets: source, toOffset: destination)
173|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
174|27e597|    }
175|b4687f|    
176|18f529|    // MARK: - Environment Variables
177|b4687f|    
178|4ac3b4|    func addEnvironmentVariable() {
179|ed0448|        let trimmedKey = newEnvKey.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
180|701426|        let trimmedValue = newEnvValue.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
181|96a6a1|        guard !trimmedKey.isEmpty else { return }
182|d6ed84|        
183|be1d55|        currentConfig.environmentVariables[trimmedKey] = trimmedValue
184|7bd5b2|        newEnvKey = ""
185|4221f5|        newEnvValue = ""
186|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
187|27e597|    }
188|b4687f|    
189|ea292e|    func removeEnvironmentVariable(key: String) {
190|31afd9|        currentConfig.environmentVariables.removeValue(forKey: key)
191|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
192|27e597|    }
193|b4687f|    
194|be1a04|    func updateEnvironmentVariable(key: String, newValue: String) {
195|ba0563|        currentConfig.environmentVariables[key] = newValue
196|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
197|27e597|    }
198|b4687f|    
199|6f109c|    // MARK: - Presets
200|b4687f|    
201|2f3894|    func savePreset() {
202|9dd7a4|        let trimmedName = presetNameText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
203|0abc1b|        guard !trimmedName.isEmpty else {
204|7f9953|            alertMessage = "Please enter a preset name"
205|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
206|bef5d6|            return
207|5f3077|        }
208|d6ed84|        
209|90d7b5|        var preset = currentConfig
210|4587af|        preset.name = trimmedName
211|39a950|        preset.id = UUID()
212|d6ed84|        
213|824228|        // Remove existing preset with same name
214|e241d5|        savedPresets.removeAll { $0.name == trimmedName }
215|03ebeb|        savedPresets.append(preset)
216|d6ed84|        
217|4a9a42|        savePresetsToStorage()
218|19a15d|        presetNameText = ""
219|ac53c7|        alertMessage = "Preset '\(trimmedName)' saved successfully"
220|3b5718|        showSaveAlert = true
221|27e597|    }
222|b4687f|    
223|0371ff|    func loadPreset(_ preset: RunConfiguration) {
224|58a069|        currentConfig = preset
225|a908cc|        alertMessage = "Loaded preset '\(preset.name)'"
226|3b5718|        showSaveAlert = true
227|27e597|    }
228|b4687f|    
229|c28d79|    func deletePreset(at indexSet: IndexSet) {
230|2be594|        savedPresets.remove(atOffsets: indexSet)
231|4a9a42|        savePresetsToStorage()
232|27e597|    }
233|b4687f|    
234|b0bb99|    func renamePreset(_ preset: RunConfiguration, newName: String) {
235|859b11|        guard let index = savedPresets.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == preset.id }) else { return }
236|bb0e88|        savedPresets[index].name = newName
237|ae3dbf|        savedPresets[index].updatedAt = Date()
238|4a9a42|        savePresetsToStorage()
239|27e597|    }
240|b4687f|    
241|f0ec8e|    private func savePresetsToStorage() {
242|4bdf32|        if let encoded = try? JSONEncoder().encode(savedPresets) {
243|2ae326|            UserDefaults.standard.set(encoded, forKey: presetsKey)
244|5f3077|        }
245|27e597|    }
246|b4687f|    
247|5d72a5|    private func loadPresets() {
248|592a55|        guard let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: presetsKey),
249|f01575|              let decoded = try? JSONDecoder().decode([RunConfiguration].self, from: data) else {
250|bef5d6|            return
251|5f3077|        }
252|bc658e|        savedPresets = decoded
253|27e597|    }
254|b4687f|    
255|ff5187|    // MARK: - Execution
256|b4687f|    
257|669c0c|    func execute(withFile filePath: String?) async {
258|487c0c|        isExecuting = true
259|3ed98c|        executionOutput = ""
260|d6ed84|        
261|86d6f2|        // Check if this is a WASM file - use on-device WASMRunner
262|0c6d38|        if currentConfig.languageOptions.language == .wasm,
263|b97e87|           let path = filePath,
264|b26fe0|           path.hasSuffix(".wasm") {
265|0e6548|            await executeWASM(filePath: path)
266|bef5d6|            return
267|5f3077|        }
268|d6ed84|        
269|cc901c|        // For other languages, use remote runner
270|98010e|        guard let remoteRunner = remoteRunner else {
271|487b21|            alertMessage = "RemoteRunner not configured"
272|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
273|9d45fd|            isExecuting = false
274|bef5d6|            return
275|5f3077|        }
276|d6ed84|        
277|4da690|        do {
278|a721bb|            let result = try await remoteRunner.execute(
279|615b91|                filePath: filePath,
280|e9391c|                configuration: currentConfig
281|43d041|            )
282|46e029|            executionOutput = result.output
283|19e930|            if !result.success {
284|00362d|                alertMessage = "Execution failed with exit code \(result.exitCode)"
285|55a1a5|                showSaveAlert = true
286|a7dc16|            }
287|853889|        } catch {
288|a9e320|            alertMessage = "Execution error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
289|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|7b828d|        isExecuting = false
293|27e597|    }
294|b4687f|    
295|409f6c|    /// Execute a WebAssembly file using on-device WASMRunner
296|b2ec05|    private func executeWASM(filePath: String) async {
297|69a69f|        let startTime = Date()
298|05fc0c|        executionOutput = "⚡ Starting WebAssembly execution...\n"
299|189fb0|        executionOutput += "📁 File: \(filePath)\n"
300|e7d721|        executionOutput += "🔧 Function: \(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction)\n\n"
301|d6ed84|        
302|4da690|        do {
303|ca6aa6|            // Create configuration
304|57c9d7|            var config = WASMConfiguration.default
305|5b0da2|            config.enableDebugLogging = currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmDebugLogging
306|c1f0a7|            config.wasiMode = currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmEnableWASI ? .stub : .disabled
307|3070d1|            
308|f02e53|            // Create runner
309|7c8265|            let runner = try WASMRunner(configuration: config)
310|3070d1|            
311|623e02|            // Load the WASM file
312|9dcf0f|            let url = URL(fileURLWithPath: filePath)
313|2fc6f1|            try await runner.load(from: url)
314|fdf1f0|            executionOutput += "✅ Module loaded successfully\n"
315|3070d1|            
316|b03134|            // Configure WASI if enabled
317|e2975c|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmEnableWASI {
318|0194ab|                try await runner.configureWASI()
319|5b1f1f|                executionOutput += "✅ WASI configured\n"
320|a7dc16|            }
321|3070d1|            
322|75cc8b|            // Parse arguments
323|e2ffa7|            let args: [Any] = parseWASMArgs(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmArgs)
324|3070d1|            
325|118fae|            // Execute the function
326|a53fb5|            executionOutput += "\n🚀 Executing function '\(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction)'...\n"
327|d5b437|            let result = try await runner.execute(
328|fd93ff|                function: currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction,
329|382dc0|                args: args
330|43d041|            )
331|3070d1|            
332|0b5e62|            let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
333|dc3c53|            executionOutput += "\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
334|85e7ec|            executionOutput += "📤 Result: \(result)\n"
335|a720fd|            executionOutput += "⏱️ Duration: \(String(format: "%.3f", duration))s\n"
336|97c33a|            executionOutput += "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
337|3070d1|            
338|6973db|            // Clean up
339|061a0b|            await runner.unload()
340|3070d1|            
341|cae8a1|        } catch let error as WASMError {
342|3ca9bb|            executionOutput += "\n❌ WASM Error: \(error.localizedDescription)\n"
343|e75a26|            alertMessage = error.localizedDescription
344|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
345|853889|        } catch {
346|011f38|            executionOutput += "\n❌ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)\n"
347|09e90f|            alertMessage = "WASM execution error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
348|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
349|5f3077|        }
350|d6ed84|        
351|7b828d|        isExecuting = false
352|27e597|    }
353|b4687f|    
354|1ba8a7|    /// Parse WASM arguments from string (comma-separated, supports integers and floats)
355|8e8ea2|    private func parseWASMArgs(_ argsString: String) -> [Any] {
356|cffb48|        guard !argsString.isEmpty else { return [] }
357|d6ed84|        
358|919440|        return argsString.split(separator: ",").compactMap { arg -> Any? in
359|5b2e21|            let trimmed = arg.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
360|97b32d|            if let intVal = Int(trimmed) {
361|65cd77|                return intVal
362|63c384|            } else if let doubleVal = Double(trimmed) {
363|0f5bfd|                return doubleVal
364|a7dc16|            }
365|868c3a|            return trimmed
366|5f3077|        }
367|27e597|    }
368|b4687f|    
369|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
370|b4687f|    
371|4fa5d4|    private func updateTimestamp() {
372|4d127c|        currentConfig.updatedAt = Date()
373|27e597|    }
374|b4687f|    
375|13bcc2|    func buildCommandString(filePath: String?) -> String {
376|eaee3d|        var parts: [String] = []
377|d6ed84|        
378|d9063a|        // Language-specific prefix
379|012d46|        switch currentConfig.languageOptions.language {
380|9fa55d|        case .python:
381|2d2edd|            var pythonArgs: [String] = []
382|26860a|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonUnbuffered {
383|c5cc9c|                pythonArgs.append("-u")
384|a7dc16|            }
385|e4a684|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonOptimize {
386|e088fc|                pythonArgs.append("-O")
387|a7dc16|            }
388|8d1a6a|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonModuleMode {
389|b7f8c4|                pythonArgs.append("-m")
390|a7dc16|            }
391|907ae0|            parts.append("python \(pythonArgs.joined(separator: " "))".trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces))
392|3070d1|            
393|c4c850|        case .node:
394|20bc1e|            var nodeArgs: [String] = []
395|37aab8|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeInspect {
396|e6cdf1|                nodeArgs.append("--inspect")
397|a7dc16|            }
398|c45acc|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeInspectBrk {
399|b9a7b6|                nodeArgs.append("--inspect-brk")
400|a7dc16|            }
401|672c36|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeExperimentalModules {
402|4f8496|                nodeArgs.append("--experimental-modules")
403|a7dc16|            }
404|6536bc|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeNoWarnings {
405|4efe63|                nodeArgs.append("--no-warnings")
406|a7dc16|            }
407|0b4b76|            parts.append("node \(nodeArgs.joined(separator: " "))".trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces))
408|3070d1|            
409|7df5c6|        case .go:
410|4b7f98|            var goArgs: [String] = ["run"]
411|24ac13|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.goRaceDetector {
412|4fcd0f|                goArgs.append("-race")
413|a7dc16|            }
414|5d1fd2|            parts.append("go \(goArgs.joined(separator: " "))")
415|3070d1|            
416|66ab30|        case .rust:
417|e5b50f|            var cargoArgs: [String] = ["run"]
418|4d6db7|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.rustRelease {
419|90aeeb|                cargoArgs.append("--release")
420|a7dc16|            }
421|fff94b|            parts.append("cargo \(cargoArgs.joined(separator: " "))")
422|3070d1|            
423|520b7d|        default:
424|e2ff8f|            parts.append(currentConfig.languageOptions.language.rawValue.lowercased())
425|5f3077|        }
426|d6ed84|        
427|39a72d|        // File path
428|f7b7e9|        if let filePath = filePath {
429|52d00b|            parts.append(filePath)
430|5f3077|        }
431|d6ed84|        
432|58a037|        // Command line arguments
433|f8df06|        if !currentConfig.commandLineArgs.isEmpty {
434|c8b609|            parts.append(currentConfig.commandLineArgs.joined(separator: " "))
435|5f3077|        }
436|d6ed84|        
437|3cdb35|        return parts.joined(separator: " ")
438|27e597|    }
439|b31277|}

441|b85580|// MARK: - RemoteRunner Protocol
442|adc83b|
443|6a2e94|protocol RemoteRunner {
444|0a1017|    func execute(filePath: String?, configuration: RunConfiguration) async throws -> ExecutionResult
445|b31277|}
446|adc83b|
447|9599e4|struct ExecutionResult {
448|7d14a9|    let success: Bool
449|580fea|    let exitCode: Int
450|dc0bb1|    let output: String
451|13d6a6|    let errorOutput: String?
452|afb00a|    let duration: TimeInterval
453|b31277|}
454|adc83b|
455|d42b57|// MARK: - RunConfigView
456|adc83b|
457|421ca1|struct RunConfigView: View {
458|063a73|    @StateObject private var viewModel = RunConfigViewModel()
459|ac52c0|    @State private var selectedFilePath: String?
460|17f502|    @State private var showWorkingDirPicker: Bool = false
461|28a65b|    @State private var showDeleteConfirmation: Bool = false
462|22ae1f|    @State private var presetToDelete: RunConfiguration?
463|b4687f|    
464|504e43|    var body: some View {
465|0c7ea9|        NavigationView {
466|aeeb16|            Form {
467|929276|                // MARK: - Presets Section
468|137fb8|                Section(header: Text("Presets").font(.headline)) {
469|092c58|                    presetManagementView
470|4e2d32|                }
471|216278|                
472|ba2e47|                // MARK: - Language Section
473|ad82ee|                Section(header: Text("Language").font(.headline)) {
474|e34543|                    languagePickerView
475|4e2d32|                }
476|216278|                
477|7a4ab4|                // MARK: - Command Line Arguments Section
478|a22784|                Section(header: Text("Command Line Arguments").font(.headline)) {
479|2352ac|                    argumentsView
480|4e2d32|                }
481|216278|                
482|2252c7|                // MARK: - Environment Variables Section
483|ba01ec|                Section(header: Text("Environment Variables").font(.headline)) {
484|d22e2b|                    environmentVariablesView
485|4e2d32|                }
486|216278|                
487|cde5aa|                // MARK: - Working Directory Section
488|3b0198|                Section(header: Text("Working Directory").font(.headline)) {
489|a4dfe7|                    workingDirectoryView
490|4e2d32|                }
491|216278|                
492|9a46c9|                // MARK: - Language-Specific Options Section
493|ffde0a|                Section(header: Text("\(viewModel.currentConfig.languageOptions.language.rawValue) Options").font(.headline)) {
494|644195|                    languageSpecificOptionsView
495|4e2d32|                }
496|216278|                
497|485dce|                // MARK: - Command Preview Section
498|44c983|                Section(header: Text("Command Preview").font(.headline)) {
499|00ecd5|                    commandPreviewView
500|4e2d32|                }
501|216278|                
502|e1a523|                // MARK: - Execution Section
503|65412a|                Section {
504|955fba|                    executionButtonView
505|4e2d32|                }
506|a7dc16|            }
507|c1d287|            .navigationTitle("Run Configuration")
508|83a489|            .navigationBarTitleDisplayMode(.inline)
509|11663f|            .alert(isPresented: $viewModel.showSaveAlert) {
510|1b29d3|                Alert(
511|c5d40a|                    title: Text("Run Configuration"),
512|1622cd|                    message: Text(viewModel.alertMessage),
513|f6e32d|                    dismissButton: .default(Text("OK"))
514|6f642e|                )
515|a7dc16|            }
516|c83b5c|            .sheet(isPresented: $showWorkingDirPicker) {
517|50364b|                RemotePathPickerView(selectedPath: $viewModel.currentConfig.workingDirectory)
518|a7dc16|            }
519|d2f5fa|            .confirmationDialog(
520|44236b|                "Delete Preset?",
521|a86ade|                isPresented: $showDeleteConfirmation,
522|81c1f9|                titleVisibility: .visible
523|72d805|            ) {
524|b7e556|                Button("Delete", role: .destructive) {
525|3be964|                    if let preset = presetToDelete,
526|cd0d60|                       let index = viewModel.savedPresets.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == preset.id }) {
527|77661d|                        viewModel.savedPresets.remove(at: index)
528|c9717a|                    }
529|4e2d32|                }
530|6afd4e|                Button("Cancel", role: .cancel) { }
531|6335e3|            } message: {

25|5fbcc8|        self.environmentVariables = environmentVariables
26|fc717e|        self.workingDirectory = workingDirectory
27|368a01|        self.languageOptions = languageOptions
28|2cd601|        self.createdAt = Date()
29|139a2c|        self.updatedAt = Date()
30|27e597|    }
31|b31277|}
32|adc83b|
33|90192d|/// Language-specific run options
34|bf7901|struct LanguageSpecificOptions: Codable, Equatable {
35|c145c3|    var language: ProgrammingLanguage
36|b4687f|    
37|148343|    // Python options
38|142b26|    var pythonModuleMode: Bool
39|422dab|    var pythonUnbuffered: Bool
40|5dd577|    var pythonOptimize: Bool
41|b4687f|    
42|1fd360|    // Node.js options
43|65514f|    var nodeInspect: Bool
44|f378b2|    var nodeInspectBrk: Bool
45|653c45|    var nodeExperimentalModules: Bool
46|971d06|    var nodeNoWarnings: Bool
47|b4687f|    
48|78a109|    // Other language options
49|32a3e8|    var goRaceDetector: Bool
50|31d8e7|    var rustRelease: Bool
51|b4687f|    
52|d3e68e|    // WASM options
53|328efb|    var wasmFunction: String
54|9a8543|    var wasmArgs: String
55|6bbe96|    var wasmEnableWASI: Bool
56|d7c856|    var wasmDebugLogging: Bool
57|b4687f|    
58|1669c7|    init(language: ProgrammingLanguage = .python,
59|6a5d94|         pythonModuleMode: Bool = false,
60|c83907|         pythonUnbuffered: Bool = false,
61|2ffc54|         pythonOptimize: Bool = false,
62|67e9b4|         nodeInspect: Bool = false,
63|4f4fe5|         nodeInspectBrk: Bool = false,
64|b32c58|         nodeExperimentalModules: Bool = false,
65|cebd0b|         nodeNoWarnings: Bool = false,
66|130f52|         goRaceDetector: Bool = false,
67|d7fcca|         rustRelease: Bool = false,
68|9350a4|         wasmFunction: String = "main",
69|cea506|         wasmArgs: String = "",
70|85f8e4|         wasmEnableWASI: Bool = true,
71|e8df65|         wasmDebugLogging: Bool = false) {
72|cc7e71|        self.language = language
73|3aab51|        self.pythonModuleMode = pythonModuleMode
74|3d3481|        self.pythonUnbuffered = pythonUnbuffered
75|af91d2|        self.pythonOptimize = pythonOptimize
76|68f19b|        self.nodeInspect = nodeInspect
77|562e1e|        self.nodeInspectBrk = nodeInspectBrk
78|415dfc|        self.nodeExperimentalModules = nodeExperimentalModules
79|d9a841|        self.nodeNoWarnings = nodeNoWarnings
80|0948f9|        self.goRaceDetector = goRaceDetector
81|73c04b|        self.rustRelease = rustRelease
82|d2988d|        self.wasmFunction = wasmFunction
83|51df16|        self.wasmArgs = wasmArgs
84|118b79|        self.wasmEnableWASI = wasmEnableWASI
85|c9b664|        self.wasmDebugLogging = wasmDebugLogging
86|27e597|    }
87|b31277|}
88|adc83b|
89|04c9fb|enum ProgrammingLanguage: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Identifiable {
90|8d3f56|    case python = "Python"
91|90fe68|    case node = "Node.js"
92|6ba47a|    case go = "Go"
93|4db319|    case rust = "Rust"
94|a48bec|    case ruby = "Ruby"
95|b4892a|    case php = "PHP"
96|3db315|    case wasm = "WebAssembly"
97|da37f6|    case other = "Other"
98|b4687f|    
99|a5faf2|    var id: String { rawValue }
100|b4687f|    
101|4108d4|    var icon: String {
102|2e6d08|        switch self {
103|e07272|        case .python: return "🐍"
104|9c5f5e|        case .node: return "🟢"
105|690075|        case .go: return "🔵"
106|d7e45b|        case .rust: return "🦀"
107|93e904|        case .ruby: return "💎"
108|487745|        case .php: return "🐘"
109|7a3ca3|        case .wasm: return "⚡"
110|49b55c|        case .other: return "📄"
111|5f3077|        }
112|27e597|    }
113|b4687f|    
114|147dd7|    /// Detect language from file extension
115|cd92b0|    static func detect(from filePath: String?) -> ProgrammingLanguage {
116|7ea696|        guard let path = filePath else { return .other }
117|8c62fe|        let ext = (path as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
118|f60e4e|        switch ext {
119|75152b|        case "py": return .python
120|712ba2|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs": return .node
121|edae84|        case "go": return .go
122|714d49|        case "rs": return .rust
123|56dccc|        case "rb": return .ruby
124|e8bfcf|        case "php": return .php
125|63cc2e|        case "wasm": return .wasm
126|73aebd|        default: return .other
127|5f3077|        }
128|27e597|    }
129|b31277|}
130|adc83b|
131|f246bc|// MARK: - View Model
132|adc83b|
133|69d728|@MainActor
134|446ae1|class RunConfigViewModel: ObservableObject {
135|74f107|    @Published var currentConfig: RunConfiguration
136|9ebb16|    @Published var savedPresets: [RunConfiguration] = []
137|f87a06|    @Published var newArgText: String = ""
138|a0c267|    @Published var newEnvKey: String = ""
139|9eb621|    @Published var newEnvValue: String = ""
140|f04408|    @Published var presetNameText: String = ""
141|38d935|    @Published var showSaveAlert: Bool = false
142|93f263|    @Published var alertMessage: String = ""
143|1913b9|    @Published var isExecuting: Bool = false
144|7e90db|    @Published var executionOutput: String = ""
145|b4687f|    
146|6ee585|    private let presetsKey = "runConfigurationPresets"
147|b5a33c|    private var remoteRunner: RemoteRunner?
148|b4687f|    
149|37ec70|    init(remoteRunner: RemoteRunner? = nil) {
150|242c2d|        self.remoteRunner = remoteRunner
151|c7ea52|        self.currentConfig = RunConfiguration(name: "New Configuration")
152|8bbc24|        loadPresets()
153|27e597|    }
154|b4687f|    
155|a94ac5|    // MARK: - Command Line Arguments
156|b4687f|    
157|e873ad|    func addArgument() {
158|ea289f|        let trimmed = newArgText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
159|0eedd3|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { return }
160|cccd52|        currentConfig.commandLineArgs.append(trimmed)
161|4ed21b|        newArgText = ""
162|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
163|27e597|    }
164|b4687f|    
165|3fec38|    func removeArgument(at index: Int) {
166|c08fc6|        guard index >= 0 && index < currentConfig.commandLineArgs.count else { return }
167|9cbe01|        currentConfig.commandLineArgs.remove(at: index)
168|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
169|27e597|    }
170|b4687f|    
171|2ac63f|    func moveArgument(from source: IndexSet, to destination: Int) {
172|9497ba|        currentConfig.commandLineArgs.move(fromOffsets: source, toOffset: destination)
173|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
174|27e597|    }
175|b4687f|    
176|18f529|    // MARK: - Environment Variables
177|b4687f|    
178|4ac3b4|    func addEnvironmentVariable() {
179|ed0448|        let trimmedKey = newEnvKey.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
180|701426|        let trimmedValue = newEnvValue.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
181|96a6a1|        guard !trimmedKey.isEmpty else { return }
182|d6ed84|        
183|be1d55|        currentConfig.environmentVariables[trimmedKey] = trimmedValue
184|7bd5b2|        newEnvKey = ""
185|4221f5|        newEnvValue = ""
186|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
187|27e597|    }
188|b4687f|    
189|ea292e|    func removeEnvironmentVariable(key: String) {
190|31afd9|        currentConfig.environmentVariables.removeValue(forKey: key)
191|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
192|27e597|    }
193|b4687f|    
194|be1a04|    func updateEnvironmentVariable(key: String, newValue: String) {
195|ba0563|        currentConfig.environmentVariables[key] = newValue
196|e88579|        updateTimestamp()
197|27e597|    }
198|b4687f|    
199|6f109c|    // MARK: - Presets
200|b4687f|    
201|2f3894|    func savePreset() {
202|9dd7a4|        let trimmedName = presetNameText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
203|0abc1b|        guard !trimmedName.isEmpty else {
204|7f9953|            alertMessage = "Please enter a preset name"
205|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
206|bef5d6|            return
207|5f3077|        }
208|d6ed84|        
209|90d7b5|        var preset = currentConfig
210|4587af|        preset.name = trimmedName
211|39a950|        preset.id = UUID()
212|d6ed84|        
213|824228|        // Remove existing preset with same name
214|e241d5|        savedPresets.removeAll { $0.name == trimmedName }
215|03ebeb|        savedPresets.append(preset)
216|d6ed84|        
217|4a9a42|        savePresetsToStorage()
218|19a15d|        presetNameText = ""
219|ac53c7|        alertMessage = "Preset '\(trimmedName)' saved successfully"
220|3b5718|        showSaveAlert = true
221|27e597|    }
222|b4687f|    
223|0371ff|    func loadPreset(_ preset: RunConfiguration) {
224|58a069|        currentConfig = preset
225|a908cc|        alertMessage = "Loaded preset '\(preset.name)'"
226|3b5718|        showSaveAlert = true
227|27e597|    }
228|b4687f|    
229|c28d79|    func deletePreset(at indexSet: IndexSet) {
230|2be594|        savedPresets.remove(atOffsets: indexSet)
231|4a9a42|        savePresetsToStorage()
232|27e597|    }
233|b4687f|    
234|b0bb99|    func renamePreset(_ preset: RunConfiguration, newName: String) {
235|859b11|        guard let index = savedPresets.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == preset.id }) else { return }
236|bb0e88|        savedPresets[index].name = newName
237|ae3dbf|        savedPresets[index].updatedAt = Date()
238|4a9a42|        savePresetsToStorage()
239|27e597|    }
240|b4687f|    
241|f0ec8e|    private func savePresetsToStorage() {
242|4bdf32|        if let encoded = try? JSONEncoder().encode(savedPresets) {
243|2ae326|            UserDefaults.standard.set(encoded, forKey: presetsKey)
244|5f3077|        }
245|27e597|    }
246|b4687f|    
247|5d72a5|    private func loadPresets() {
248|592a55|        guard let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: presetsKey),
249|f01575|              let decoded = try? JSONDecoder().decode([RunConfiguration].self, from: data) else {
250|bef5d6|            return
251|5f3077|        }
252|bc658e|        savedPresets = decoded
253|27e597|    }
254|b4687f|    
255|ff5187|    // MARK: - Execution
256|b4687f|    
257|669c0c|    func execute(withFile filePath: String?) async {
258|487c0c|        isExecuting = true
259|3ed98c|        executionOutput = ""
260|d6ed84|        
261|86d6f2|        // Check if this is a WASM file - use on-device WASMRunner
262|0c6d38|        if currentConfig.languageOptions.language == .wasm,
263|b97e87|           let path = filePath,
264|b26fe0|           path.hasSuffix(".wasm") {
265|0e6548|            await executeWASM(filePath: path)
266|bef5d6|            return
267|5f3077|        }
268|d6ed84|        
269|cc901c|        // For other languages, use remote runner
270|98010e|        guard let remoteRunner = remoteRunner else {
271|487b21|            alertMessage = "RemoteRunner not configured"
272|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
273|9d45fd|            isExecuting = false
274|bef5d6|            return
275|5f3077|        }
276|d6ed84|        
277|4da690|        do {
278|a721bb|            let result = try await remoteRunner.execute(
279|615b91|                filePath: filePath,
280|e9391c|                configuration: currentConfig
281|43d041|            )
282|46e029|            executionOutput = result.output
283|19e930|            if !result.success {
284|00362d|                alertMessage = "Execution failed with exit code \(result.exitCode)"
285|55a1a5|                showSaveAlert = true
286|a7dc16|            }
287|853889|        } catch {
288|a9e320|            alertMessage = "Execution error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
289|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|7b828d|        isExecuting = false
293|27e597|    }
294|b4687f|    
295|409f6c|    /// Execute a WebAssembly file using on-device WASMRunner
296|b2ec05|    private func executeWASM(filePath: String) async {
297|69a69f|        let startTime = Date()
298|05fc0c|        executionOutput = "⚡ Starting WebAssembly execution...\n"
299|189fb0|        executionOutput += "📁 File: \(filePath)\n"
300|e7d721|        executionOutput += "🔧 Function: \(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction)\n\n"
301|d6ed84|        
302|4da690|        do {
303|ca6aa6|            // Create configuration
304|57c9d7|            var config = WASMConfiguration.default
305|5b0da2|            config.enableDebugLogging = currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmDebugLogging
306|c1f0a7|            config.wasiMode = currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmEnableWASI ? .stub : .disabled
307|3070d1|            
308|f02e53|            // Create runner
309|7c8265|            let runner = try WASMRunner(configuration: config)
310|3070d1|            
311|623e02|            // Load the WASM file
312|9dcf0f|            let url = URL(fileURLWithPath: filePath)
313|2fc6f1|            try await runner.load(from: url)
314|fdf1f0|            executionOutput += "✅ Module loaded successfully\n"
315|3070d1|            
316|b03134|            // Configure WASI if enabled
317|e2975c|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmEnableWASI {
318|0194ab|                try await runner.configureWASI()
319|5b1f1f|                executionOutput += "✅ WASI configured\n"
320|a7dc16|            }
321|3070d1|            
322|75cc8b|            // Parse arguments
323|e2ffa7|            let args: [Any] = parseWASMArgs(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmArgs)
324|3070d1|            
325|118fae|            // Execute the function
326|a53fb5|            executionOutput += "\n🚀 Executing function '\(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction)'...\n"
327|d5b437|            let result = try await runner.execute(
328|fd93ff|                function: currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction,
329|382dc0|                args: args
330|43d041|            )
331|3070d1|            
332|0b5e62|            let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
333|dc3c53|            executionOutput += "\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
334|85e7ec|            executionOutput += "📤 Result: \(result)\n"
335|a720fd|            executionOutput += "⏱️ Duration: \(String(format: "%.3f", duration))s\n"
336|97c33a|            executionOutput += "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
337|3070d1|            
338|6973db|            // Clean up
339|061a0b|            await runner.unload()
340|3070d1|            
341|cae8a1|        } catch let error as WASMError {
342|3ca9bb|            executionOutput += "\n❌ WASM Error: \(error.localizedDescription)\n"
343|e75a26|            alertMessage = error.localizedDescription
344|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
345|853889|        } catch {
346|011f38|            executionOutput += "\n❌ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)\n"
347|09e90f|            alertMessage = "WASM execution error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
348|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
349|5f3077|        }
350|d6ed84|        
351|7b828d|        isExecuting = false
352|27e597|    }
353|b4687f|    
354|1ba8a7|    /// Parse WASM arguments from string (comma-separated, supports integers and floats)
355|8e8ea2|    private func parseWASMArgs(_ argsString: String) -> [Any] {
356|cffb48|        guard !argsString.isEmpty else { return [] }
357|d6ed84|        
358|919440|        return argsString.split(separator: ",").compactMap { arg -> Any? in
359|5b2e21|            let trimmed = arg.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
360|97b32d|            if let intVal = Int(trimmed) {
361|65cd77|                return intVal
362|63c384|            } else if let doubleVal = Double(trimmed) {
363|0f5bfd|                return doubleVal
364|a7dc16|            }
365|868c3a|            return trimmed
366|5f3077|        }
367|27e597|    }
368|b4687f|    
369|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
370|b4687f|    
371|4fa5d4|    private func updateTimestamp() {
372|4d127c|        currentConfig.updatedAt = Date()
373|27e597|    }
374|b4687f|    
375|13bcc2|    func buildCommandString(filePath: String?) -> String {
376|eaee3d|        var parts: [String] = []
377|d6ed84|        
378|d9063a|        // Language-specific prefix
379|012d46|        switch currentConfig.languageOptions.language {
380|9fa55d|        case .python:
381|2d2edd|            var pythonArgs: [String] = []
382|26860a|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonUnbuffered {
383|c5cc9c|                pythonArgs.append("-u")
384|a7dc16|            }
385|e4a684|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonOptimize {
386|e088fc|                pythonArgs.append("-O")
387|a7dc16|            }
388|8d1a6a|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonModuleMode {
389|b7f8c4|                pythonArgs.append("-m")
390|a7dc16|            }
391|907ae0|            parts.append("python \(pythonArgs.joined(separator: " "))".trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces))
392|3070d1|            
393|c4c850|        case .node:
394|20bc1e|            var nodeArgs: [String] = []
395|37aab8|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeInspect {
396|e6cdf1|                nodeArgs.append("--inspect")
397|a7dc16|            }
398|c45acc|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeInspectBrk {
399|b9a7b6|                nodeArgs.append("--inspect-brk")
400|a7dc16|            }
401|672c36|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeExperimentalModules {
402|4f8496|                nodeArgs.append("--experimental-modules")
403|a7dc16|            }
404|6536bc|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeNoWarnings {
405|4efe63|                nodeArgs.append("--no-warnings")
406|a7dc16|            }
407|0b4b76|            parts.append("node \(nodeArgs.joined(separator: " "))".trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces))
408|3070d1|            
409|7df5c6|        case .go:
410|4b7f98|            var goArgs: [String] = ["run"]
411|24ac13|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.goRaceDetector {
412|4fcd0f|                goArgs.append("-race")
413|a7dc16|            }
414|5d1fd2|            parts.append("go \(goArgs.joined(separator: " "))")
415|3070d1|            
416|66ab30|        case .rust:
417|e5b50f|            var cargoArgs: [String] = ["run"]
418|4d6db7|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.rustRelease {
419|90aeeb|                cargoArgs.append("--release")
420|a7dc16|            }
421|fff94b|            parts.append("cargo \(cargoArgs.joined(separator: " "))")
422|3070d1|            
423|520b7d|        default:
424|e2ff8f|            parts.append(currentConfig.languageOptions.language.rawValue.lowercased())
425|5f3077|        }
426|d6ed84|        
427|39a72d|        // File path
428|f7b7e9|        if let filePath = filePath {
429|52d00b|            parts.append(filePath)
430|5f3077|        }
431|d6ed84|        
432|58a037|        // Command line arguments
433|f8df06|        if !currentConfig.commandLineArgs.isEmpty {
434|c8b609|            parts.append(currentConfig.commandLineArgs.joined(separator: " "))
435|5f3077|        }
436|d6ed84|        
437|3cdb35|        return parts.joined(separator: " ")
438|27e597|    }
439|b31277|}
440|adc83b|
441|b85580|// MARK: - RemoteRunner Protocol
442|adc83b|
443|6a2e94|protocol RemoteRunner {
444|0a1017|    func execute(filePath: String?, configuration: RunConfiguration) async throws -> ExecutionResult
445|b31277|}
446|adc83b|
447|9599e4|struct ExecutionResult {
448|7d14a9|    let success: Bool
449|580fea|    let exitCode: Int
450|dc0bb1|    let output: String
451|13d6a6|    let errorOutput: String?
452|afb00a|    let duration: TimeInterval
453|b31277|}
454|adc83b|
455|d42b57|// MARK: - RunConfigView
456|adc83b|
457|421ca1|struct RunConfigView: View {
458|063a73|    @StateObject private var viewModel = RunConfigViewModel()
459|ac52c0|    @State private var selectedFilePath: String?
460|17f502|    @State private var showWorkingDirPicker: Bool = false
461|28a65b|    @State private var showDeleteConfirmation: Bool = false
462|22ae1f|    @State private var presetToDelete: RunConfiguration?
463|b4687f|    
464|504e43|    var body: some View {
465|0c7ea9|        NavigationView {
466|aeeb16|            Form {
467|929276|                // MARK: - Presets Section
468|137fb8|                Section(header: Text("Presets").font(.headline)) {
469|092c58|                    presetManagementView
470|4e2d32|                }
471|216278|                
472|ba2e47|                // MARK: - Language Section
473|ad82ee|                Section(header: Text("Language").font(.headline)) {
474|e34543|                    languagePickerView
475|4e2d32|                }
476|216278|                
477|7a4ab4|                // MARK: - Command Line Arguments Section
478|a22784|                Section(header: Text("Command Line Arguments").font(.headline)) {
479|2352ac|                    argumentsView
480|4e2d32|                }
481|216278|                
482|2252c7|                // MARK: - Environment Variables Section
483|ba01ec|                Section(header: Text("Environment Variables").font(.headline)) {
484|d22e2b|                    environmentVariablesView
485|4e2d32|                }
486|216278|                
487|cde5aa|                // MARK: - Working Directory Section
488|3b0198|                Section(header: Text("Working Directory").font(.headline)) {
489|a4dfe7|                    workingDirectoryView
490|4e2d32|                }
491|216278|                
492|9a46c9|                // MARK: - Language-Specific Options Section
493|ffde0a|                Section(header: Text("\(viewModel.currentConfig.languageOptions.language.rawValue) Options").font(.headline)) {
494|644195|                    languageSpecificOptionsView
495|4e2d32|                }
496|216278|                
497|485dce|                // MARK: - Command Preview Section
498|44c983|                Section(header: Text("Command Preview").font(.headline)) {
499|00ecd5|                    commandPreviewView
500|4e2d32|                }
501|216278|                
502|e1a523|                // MARK: - Execution Section
503|65412a|                Section {
504|955fba|                    executionButtonView
505|4e2d32|                }
506|a7dc16|            }
507|c1d287|            .navigationTitle("Run Configuration")
508|83a489|            .navigationBarTitleDisplayMode(.inline)

917|216278|

924|c9717a|                    }

927|c9717a|                    }

931|4e2d32|                }
932|216278|

954|b4687f|    
955|7449f8|    private func navigateTo(_ path: String) {
956|b8ae15|        currentPath = path
957|34e57c|        pathHistory.append(path)
958|27e597|    }
959|b4687f|    
960|2ce246|    private func goBack() {
961|8c663c|        guard pathHistory.count > 1 else { return }
962|cab398|        pathHistory.removeLast()
963|c8b7d3|        currentPath = pathHistory.last ?? "/"
964|27e597|    }

89|04c9fb|enum ProgrammingLanguage: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Identifiable {
90|8d3f56|    case python = "Python"
91|90fe68|    case node = "Node.js"
92|6ba47a|    case go = "Go"
93|4db319|    case rust = "Rust"
94|a48bec|    case ruby = "Ruby"
95|b4892a|    case php = "PHP"
96|3db315|    case wasm = "WebAssembly"
97|da37f6|    case other = "Other"
98|b4687f|    
99|a5faf2|    var id: String { rawValue }
100|b4687f|    
101|4108d4|    var icon: String {
102|2e6d08|        switch self {
103|e07272|        case .python: return "🐍"
104|9c5f5e|        case .node: return "🟢"
105|690075|        case .go: return "🔵"
106|d7e45b|        case .rust: return "🦀"
107|93e904|        case .ruby: return "💎"
108|487745|        case .php: return "🐘"
109|7a3ca3|        case .wasm: return "⚡"
110|49b55c|        case .other: return "📄"
111|5f3077|        }
112|27e597|    }
113|b4687f|    
114|147dd7|    /// Detect language from file extension
115|cd92b0|    static func detect(from filePath: String?) -> ProgrammingLanguage {
116|7ea696|        guard let path = filePath else { return .other }
117|8c62fe|        let ext = (path as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
118|f60e4e|        switch ext {
119|75152b|        case "py": return .python
120|712ba2|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs": return .node
121|edae84|        case "go": return .go
122|714d49|        case "rs": return .rust
123|56dccc|        case "rb": return .ruby
124|e8bfcf|        case "php": return .php
125|63cc2e|        case "wasm": return .wasm
126|73aebd|        default: return .other
127|5f3077|        }
128|27e597|    }

199|6f109c|    // MARK: - Presets
200|b4687f|    
201|2f3894|    func savePreset() {
202|9dd7a4|        let trimmedName = presetNameText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
203|0abc1b|        guard !trimmedName.isEmpty else {
204|7f9953|            alertMessage = "Please enter a preset name"
205|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
206|bef5d6|            return
207|5f3077|        }
208|d6ed84|        
209|90d7b5|        var preset = currentConfig
210|4587af|        preset.name = trimmedName
211|39a950|        preset.id = UUID()
212|d6ed84|        
213|824228|        // Remove existing preset with same name
214|e241d5|        savedPresets.removeAll { $0.name == trimmedName }
215|03ebeb|        savedPresets.append(preset)
216|d6ed84|        
217|4a9a42|        savePresetsToStorage()
218|19a15d|        presetNameText = ""
219|ac53c7|        alertMessage = "Preset '\(trimmedName)' saved successfully"
220|3b5718|        showSaveAlert = true
221|27e597|    }
222|b4687f|

228|b4687f|

236|bb0e88|        savedPresets[index].name = newName

240|b4687f|    
241|f0ec8e|    private func savePresetsToStorage() {
242|4bdf32|        if let encoded = try? JSONEncoder().encode(savedPresets) {

244|5f3077|        }

246|b4687f|

250|bef5d6|            return
251|5f3077|        }
252|bc658e|        savedPresets = decoded

255|ff5187|    // MARK: - Execution
256|b4687f|    
257|669c0c|    func execute(withFile filePath: String?) async {
258|487c0c|        isExecuting = true
259|3ed98c|        executionOutput = ""
260|d6ed84|        
261|86d6f2|        // Check if this is a WASM file - use on-device WASMRunner
262|0c6d38|        if currentConfig.languageOptions.language == .wasm,
263|b97e87|           let path = filePath,
264|b26fe0|           path.hasSuffix(".wasm") {
265|0e6548|            await executeWASM(filePath: path)
266|bef5d6|            return
267|5f3077|        }
268|d6ed84|        
269|cc901c|        // For other languages, use remote runner
270|98010e|        guard let remoteRunner = remoteRunner else {
271|487b21|            alertMessage = "RemoteRunner not configured"
272|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
273|9d45fd|            isExecuting = false
274|bef5d6|            return
275|5f3077|        }
276|d6ed84|        
277|4da690|        do {
278|a721bb|            let result = try await remoteRunner.execute(
279|615b91|                filePath: filePath,
280|e9391c|                configuration: currentConfig
281|43d041|            )
282|46e029|            executionOutput = result.output
283|19e930|            if !result.success {
284|00362d|                alertMessage = "Execution failed with exit code \(result.exitCode)"
285|55a1a5|                showSaveAlert = true
286|a7dc16|            }
287|853889|        } catch {
288|a9e320|            alertMessage = "Execution error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
289|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|7b828d|        isExecuting = false
293|27e597|    }
294|b4687f|    
295|409f6c|    /// Execute a WebAssembly file using on-device WASMRunner
296|b2ec05|    private func executeWASM(filePath: String) async {
297|69a69f|        let startTime = Date()
298|05fc0c|        executionOutput = "⚡ Starting WebAssembly execution...\n"
299|189fb0|        executionOutput += "📁 File: \(filePath)\n"
300|e7d721|        executionOutput += "🔧 Function: \(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction)\n\n"
301|d6ed84|        
302|4da690|        do {
303|ca6aa6|            // Create configuration
304|57c9d7|            var config = WASMConfiguration.default
305|5b0da2|            config.enableDebugLogging = currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmDebugLogging
306|c1f0a7|            config.wasiMode = currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmEnableWASI ? .stub : .disabled
307|3070d1|            
308|f02e53|            // Create runner
309|7c8265|            let runner = try WASMRunner(configuration: config)
310|3070d1|            
311|623e02|            // Load the WASM file
312|9dcf0f|            let url = URL(fileURLWithPath: filePath)
313|2fc6f1|            try await runner.load(from: url)
314|fdf1f0|            executionOutput += "✅ Module loaded successfully\n"
315|3070d1|            
316|b03134|            // Configure WASI if enabled
317|e2975c|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmEnableWASI {
318|0194ab|                try await runner.configureWASI()
319|5b1f1f|                executionOutput += "✅ WASI configured\n"
320|a7dc16|            }
321|3070d1|            
322|75cc8b|            // Parse arguments
323|e2ffa7|            let args: [Any] = parseWASMArgs(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmArgs)
324|3070d1|            
325|118fae|            // Execute the function
326|a53fb5|            executionOutput += "\n🚀 Executing function '\(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction)'...\n"
327|d5b437|            let result = try await runner.execute(
328|fd93ff|                function: currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction,
329|382dc0|                args: args
330|43d041|            )
331|3070d1|            
332|0b5e62|            let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
333|dc3c53|            executionOutput += "\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
334|85e7ec|            executionOutput += "📤 Result: \(result)\n"
335|a720fd|            executionOutput += "⏱️ Duration: \(String(format: "%.3f", duration))s\n"
336|97c33a|            executionOutput += "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
337|3070d1|            
338|6973db|            // Clean up
339|061a0b|            await runner.unload()
340|3070d1|            
341|cae8a1|        } catch let error as WASMError {
342|3ca9bb|            executionOutput += "\n❌ WASM Error: \(error.localizedDescription)\n"
343|e75a26|            alertMessage = error.localizedDescription
344|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
345|853889|        } catch {
346|011f38|            executionOutput += "\n❌ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)\n"
347|09e90f|            alertMessage = "WASM execution error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
348|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
349|5f3077|        }
350|d6ed84|        
351|7b828d|        isExecuting = false
352|27e597|    }
353|b4687f|    
354|1ba8a7|    /// Parse WASM arguments from string (comma-separated, supports integers and floats)
355|8e8ea2|    private func parseWASMArgs(_ argsString: String) -> [Any] {
356|cffb48|        guard !argsString.isEmpty else { return [] }
357|d6ed84|        
358|919440|        return argsString.split(separator: ",").compactMap { arg -> Any? in
359|5b2e21|            let trimmed = arg.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
360|97b32d|            if let intVal = Int(trimmed) {
361|65cd77|                return intVal
362|63c384|            } else if let doubleVal = Double(trimmed) {
363|0f5bfd|                return doubleVal
364|a7dc16|            }
365|868c3a|            return trimmed
366|5f3077|        }
367|27e597|    }
368|b4687f|    
369|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
370|b4687f|    
371|4fa5d4|    private func updateTimestamp() {
372|4d127c|        currentConfig.updatedAt = Date()
373|27e597|    }
374|b4687f|    
375|13bcc2|    func buildCommandString(filePath: String?) -> String {
376|eaee3d|        var parts: [String] = []
377|d6ed84|        
378|d9063a|        // Language-specific prefix
379|012d46|        switch currentConfig.languageOptions.language {
380|9fa55d|        case .python:
381|2d2edd|            var pythonArgs: [String] = []
382|26860a|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonUnbuffered {
383|c5cc9c|                pythonArgs.append("-u")
384|a7dc16|            }
385|e4a684|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonOptimize {
386|e088fc|                pythonArgs.append("-O")
387|a7dc16|            }
388|8d1a6a|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonModuleMode {
389|b7f8c4|                pythonArgs.append("-m")
390|a7dc16|            }
391|907ae0|            parts.append("python \(pythonArgs.joined(separator: " "))".trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces))
392|3070d1|            
393|c4c850|        case .node:
394|20bc1e|            var nodeArgs: [String] = []
395|37aab8|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeInspect {
396|e6cdf1|                nodeArgs.append("--inspect")
397|a7dc16|            }
398|c45acc|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeInspectBrk {
399|b9a7b6|                nodeArgs.append("--inspect-brk")
400|a7dc16|            }
401|672c36|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeExperimentalModules {
402|4f8496|                nodeArgs.append("--experimental-modules")
403|a7dc16|            }
404|6536bc|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeNoWarnings {
405|4efe63|                nodeArgs.append("--no-warnings")
406|a7dc16|            }
407|0b4b76|            parts.append("node \(nodeArgs.joined(separator: " "))".trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces))
408|3070d1|            
409|7df5c6|        case .go:
410|4b7f98|            var goArgs: [String] = ["run"]
411|24ac13|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.goRaceDetector {
412|4fcd0f|                goArgs.append("-race")
413|a7dc16|            }
414|5d1fd2|            parts.append("go \(goArgs.joined(separator: " "))")
415|3070d1|            
416|66ab30|        case .rust:
417|e5b50f|            var cargoArgs: [String] = ["run"]
418|4d6db7|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.rustRelease {
419|90aeeb|                cargoArgs.append("--release")
420|a7dc16|            }
421|fff94b|            parts.append("cargo \(cargoArgs.joined(separator: " "))")
422|3070d1|            
423|520b7d|        default:
424|e2ff8f|            parts.append(currentConfig.languageOptions.language.rawValue.lowercased())
425|5f3077|        }
426|d6ed84|        
427|39a72d|        // File path
428|f7b7e9|        if let filePath = filePath {
429|52d00b|            parts.append(filePath)
430|5f3077|        }
431|d6ed84|        
432|58a037|        // Command line arguments
433|f8df06|        if !currentConfig.commandLineArgs.isEmpty {
434|c8b609|            parts.append(currentConfig.commandLineArgs.joined(separator: " "))
435|5f3077|        }
436|d6ed84|        
437|3cdb35|        return parts.joined(separator: " ")
438|27e597|    }

443|6a2e94|protocol RemoteRunner {

449|580fea|    let exitCode: Int
450|dc0bb1|    let output: String
451|13d6a6|    let errorOutput: String?
452|afb00a|    let duration: TimeInterval
453|b31277|}

896|8df0fe|struct RemotePathPickerView: View {
897|4c7eb2|    @Binding var selectedPath: String
898|293fac|    @Environment(\.presentationMode) var presentationMode
899|b1e069|    @State private var currentPath: String = "/"
900|82c695|    @State private var pathHistory: [String] = ["/"]
901|b4687f|    
902|504e43|    var body: some View {
903|0c7ea9|        NavigationView {
904|319386|            List {
905|6435c4|                Section(header: Text("Current Path")) {
906|088fc7|                    HStack {
907|6a6f9c|                        TextField("Path", text: $currentPath)
908|53a563|                            .textFieldStyle(RoundedBorderTextFieldStyle())
909|9034ee|                            .font(.system(.body, design: .monospaced))
910|956cfe|                        
911|9469ef|                        Button(action: { goBack() }) {
912|c20e5e|                            Image(systemName: "arrow.backward")
913|392b35|                        }
914|58cee4|                        .disabled(pathHistory.count <= 1)
915|c9717a|                    }
916|4e2d32|                }
917|216278|                
918|b78416|                Section(header: Text("Quick Locations")) {
919|af466d|                    Button(action: { navigateTo("/") }) {
920|082858|                        Label("Root", systemImage: "forward.fill")
921|c9717a|                    }
922|92714b|                    Button(action: { navigateTo("~") }) {
923|a67d69|                        Label("Home", systemImage: "house.fill")
924|c9717a|                    }
925|0f8bec|                    Button(action: { navigateTo("/tmp") }) {
926|a7299b|                        Label("Temporary", systemImage: "clock.fill")
927|c9717a|                    }
928|680f3b|                    Button(action: { navigateTo("/var/log") }) {
929|811f5b|                        Label("Logs", systemImage: "doc.text.fill")
930|c9717a|                    }
931|4e2d32|                }
932|216278|                
933|65412a|                Section {
934|46042b|                    Button(action: {
935|e472ab|                        selectedPath = currentPath
936|79e7cb|                        presentationMode.wrappedValue.dismiss()
937|c3144f|                    }) {
938|85b952|                        Label("Select This Directory", systemImage: "checkmark.circle.fill")
939|080287|                            .foregroundColor(.blue)
940|c9717a|                    }
941|4e2d32|                }
942|a7dc16|            }
943|b6c73b|            .navigationTitle("Choose Working Directory")
944|83a489|            .navigationBarTitleDisplayMode(.inline)
945|806036|            .toolbar {
946|f0ac3b|                ToolbarItem(placement: .cancellationAction) {
947|e1d1c6|                    Button("Cancel") {
948|79e7cb|                        presentationMode.wrappedValue.dismiss()
949|c9717a|                    }
950|4e2d32|                }
951|a7dc16|            }
952|5f3077|        }
953|27e597|    }
954|b4687f|    
955|7449f8|    private func navigateTo(_ path: String) {
956|b8ae15|        currentPath = path
957|34e57c|        pathHistory.append(path)
958|27e597|    }
959|b4687f|    
960|2ce246|    private func goBack() {
961|8c663c|        guard pathHistory.count > 1 else { return }
962|cab398|        pathHistory.removeLast()

135|8c8974|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ToggleSidebar"))) { _ in
136|53cad1|            editorCore.toggleSidebar()
137|5f3077|        }
138|f012ad|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowQuickOpen"))) { _ in
139|386b9a|            editorCore.showQuickOpen = true
140|5f3077|        }
141|71e497|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowGoToSymbol"))) { _ in
142|e57e74|            editorCore.showGoToSymbol = true
143|5f3077|        }
144|61fe23|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowGoToLine"))) { _ in
145|8cc4b6|            editorCore.showGoToLine = true
146|5f3077|        }
147|7f8a05|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowAIAssistant"))) { _ in
148|0a68c1|            editorCore.showAIAssistant = true
149|5f3077|        }
150|809dfc|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("NewFile"))) { _ in
151|b60db2|            editorCore.addTab()
152|5f3077|        }
153|8d2162|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("SaveFile"))) { _ in
154|07f047|            editorCore.saveActiveTab()
155|5f3077|        }
156|d2a947|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("CloseTab"))) { _ in
157|c7a65d|            if let id = editorCore.activeTabId { editorCore.closeTab(id: id) }
158|5f3077|        }
159|a9ccd0|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowFind"))) { _ in
160|72e173|            editorCore.showSearch = true
161|5f3077|        }
162|c69ebf|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ZoomIn"))) { _ in
163|224c97|            editorCore.zoomIn()
164|5f3077|        }
165|7ff5a6|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ZoomOut"))) { _ in
166|18c95d|            editorCore.zoomOut()
167|5f3077|        }
168|fb4855|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("RunWithoutDebugging"))) { _ in
169|7ff579|            // Execute the current file using JSRunner for .js files
170|71e6ee|            if let activeTab = editorCore.activeTab {
171|a60731|                CodeExecutionService.shared.executeCurrentFile(
172|6332f1|                    fileName: activeTab.fileName,
173|d26039|                    content: activeTab.content
174|6f642e|                )
175|810960|                // Show the terminal/panel so user can see output
176|f34303|                showTerminal = true
177|a7dc16|            }
178|5f3077|        }
179|4a37b7|        .environmentObject(themeManager)
180|e3bdc6|        .environmentObject(editorCore)
181|27e597|    }
182|b4687f|    
183|231605|    private func finishOpeningWorkspace(_ url: URL) {
184|6dcdb7|        fileNavigator.loadFileTree(at: url)
185|d79336|        Task { @MainActor in
186|99e24e|            LaunchManager.shared.setWorkspaceRoot(url)
187|eccbe2|            GitManager.shared.setWorkingDirectory(url)
188|5f3077|        }
189|27e597|    }
190|b4687f|    
191|65a033|    private func updateWindowTitle() {
192|53ad0a|        if let activeTab = editorCore.activeTab {
193|ba8861|            let fileName = activeTab.fileName
194|b072a0|            let unsavedIndicator = activeTab.isUnsaved ? "● " : ""
195|741609|            windowTitle = "\(unsavedIndicator)\(fileName) - VS Code"
196|59ea7f|        } else if !editorCore.tabs.isEmpty {
197|fa7eae|            windowTitle = "VS Code"
198|b31999|        } else {
199|6c3506|            windowTitle = "Welcome - VS Code"
200|5f3077|        }
201|d6ed84|        
202|c675c5|        // Notify the app of the title change
203|63edcc|        NotificationCenter.default.post(
204|9251fc|            name: NSNotification.Name("WindowTitleDidChange"),
205|33f159|            object: nil,
206|332f22|            userInfo: ["title": windowTitle]
207|3143a4|        )
208|27e597|    }

210|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
211|0bbc6d|    private var sidebarContent: some View {
212|34711c|        switch selectedSidebarTab {
213|ab83f1|        case 0:
214|161f7c|            IDESidebarFiles(editorCore: editorCore, fileNavigator: fileNavigator, showFolderPicker: $showingFolderPicker, theme: theme)
215|032375|        case 1:
216|19e3bd|            SidebarSearchView(theme: theme)
217|12d44a|        case 2:
218|7fc3ae|            GitView()
219|1a2232|        case 3:
220|7116ef|            DebugView()
221|520b7d|        default:
222|161f7c|            IDESidebarFiles(editorCore: editorCore, fileNavigator: fileNavigator, showFolderPicker: $showingFolderPicker, theme: theme)
223|5f3077|        }
224|27e597|    }

255|504e43|    var body: some View {

259|a02350|                Spacer()
260|124c35|                Button(action: { showFolderPicker = true }) {

266|eaa303|                if fileNavigator.fileTree != nil {

268|7cfff4|                        Image(systemName: "arrow.clockwise").font(.caption)
269|681233|                    }.foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground.opacity(0.7))
270|4e2d32|                }

272|3070d1|            
273|6b85db|            ScrollView {
274|492557|                VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 2) {
275|5cce6c|                    if let tree = fileNavigator.fileTree {
276|46c9f4|                        FileTreeView(root: tree, fileNavigator: fileNavigator, editorCore: editorCore)
277|540066|                    } else {

279|c9717a|                    }

282|ea6339|        }.background(theme.sidebarBackground)

286|2efb89|struct RealFileTreeView: View {
287|7345b3|    let node: FileTreeNode
288|ded86f|    let level: Int
289|a33870|    @ObservedObject var fileNavigator: FileSystemNavigator
290|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
291|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
292|b4687f|    
293|17d62f|    var isExpanded: Bool { fileNavigator.expandedPaths.contains(node.url.path) }
294|b4687f|    
295|504e43|    var body: some View {
296|ea9354|        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 2) {
297|37f526|            HStack(spacing: 4) {
298|a37387|                if node.isDirectory {
299|440597|                    Image(systemName: isExpanded ? "chevron.down" : "chevron.right")
300|8aec79|                        .font(.caption2).frame(width: 12)
301|0b3717|                        .foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground.opacity(0.6))
302|740862|                        .onTapGesture { fileNavigator.toggleExpanded(path: node.url.path) }
303|fdd0e2|                } else {
304|df77cf|                    Spacer().frame(width: 12)
305|4e2d32|                }
306|bf729b|                Image(systemName: node.isDirectory ? "folder.fill" : fileIcon(for: node.name))
307|8237e3|                    .font(.caption)
308|a7e98c|                    .foregroundColor(node.isDirectory ? .yellow : fileColor(for: node.name))
309|926090|                Text(node.name).font(.system(.caption)).lineLimit(1)
310|985367|                    .foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground)
311|a02350|                Spacer()
312|a7dc16|            }
313|f3d9fb|            .padding(.leading, CGFloat(level * 16)).padding(.vertical, 4)
314|68d57d|            .contentShape(Rectangle())
315|835ded|            .onTapGesture {
316|a37387|                if node.isDirectory {
317|8f26cf|                    fileNavigator.toggleExpanded(path: node.url.path)
318|fdd0e2|                } else {
319|13e765|                    editorCore.openFile(from: node.url)
320|4e2d32|                }
321|a7dc16|            }
322|3070d1|            
323|dd4b6d|            if isExpanded && node.isDirectory {
324|4a6742|                ForEach(node.children) { child in
325|8deaf6|                    RealFileTreeView(node: child, level: level + 1, fileNavigator: fileNavigator, editorCore: editorCore, theme: theme)
326|4e2d32|                }
327|a7dc16|            }
328|5f3077|        }
329|27e597|    }
330|b31277|}

395|68fbe9|struct IDETabItem: View {
396|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
397|055123|    let isSelected: Bool
398|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
399|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme

404|a9dd8d|            Text(tab.fileName).font(.system(size: 12)).lineLimit(1)
405|d555ba|                .foregroundColor(isSelected ? theme.tabActiveForeground : theme.tabInactiveForeground)
406|5029ae|            if tab.isUnsaved { Circle().fill(Color.orange).frame(width: 6, height: 6) }
407|6effb3|            Button(action: { editorCore.closeTab(id: tab.id) }) {
408|f4c72a|                Image(systemName: "xmark").font(.system(size: 9, weight: .medium))

410|a7dc16|            }

412|2da2e9|        .padding(.horizontal, 12).padding(.vertical, 6)
413|116b54|        .background(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4).fill(isSelected ? theme.tabActiveBackground : theme.tabInactiveBackground))
414|7a9052|        .onTapGesture { editorCore.selectTab(id: tab.id) }
415|27e597|    }
