418|f95ca3|// MARK: - Editor with Syntax Highlighting + Autocomplete + Folding
419|adc83b|
420|a178f9|struct IDEEditorView: View {
421|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
422|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
423|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
424|b4687f|    
425|129112|    /// Feature flag for Runestone editor - uses centralized FeatureFlags
426|952908|    private var useRunestoneEditor: Bool { FeatureFlags.useRunestoneEditor }
427|adc83b|
428|834dc8|    @AppStorage("lineNumbersStyle") private var lineNumbersStyle: String = "on"
429|eba335|    @State private var text: String = ""
430|4f0ac8|    @State private var scrollPosition: Int = 0
431|36da68|    @State private var scrollOffset: CGFloat = 0
432|d473fd|    @State private var totalLines: Int = 1
433|bcf90b|    @State private var visibleLines: Int = 20
434|9cb5e9|    @State private var currentLineNumber: Int = 1
435|cc347a|    @State private var currentColumn: Int = 1
436|eee196|    @State private var cursorIndex: Int = 0
437|2c43f6|    @State private var lineHeight: CGFloat = 17
438|446eb9|    @State private var requestedCursorIndex: Int? = nil
439|5c2aeb|    @State private var requestedLineSelection: Int? = nil
440|adc83b|
441|3977e1|    @StateObject private var autocomplete = AutocompleteManager()
442|4445ec|    @State private var showAutocomplete = false
443|a9aa54|    @ObservedObject private var foldingManager = CodeFoldingManager.shared
444|f453fc|    @StateObject private var findViewModel = FindViewModel()
445|b4687f|    
446|504e43|    var body: some View {
447|94dd27|        VStack(spacing: 0) {
448|8779dd|            // Find/Replace bar
449|2b2a70|            if editorCore.showSearch {
450|38cbe4|                FindReplaceView(viewModel: findViewModel)
451|b768ed|                    .background(theme.tabBarBackground)
452|a7dc16|            }
453|3070d1|            
454|b97232|            BreadcrumbsView(editorCore: editorCore, tab: tab)
455|3070d1|            
456|ca6f75|            GeometryReader { geometry in
457|e60c16|                ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
458|7a5371|                HStack(spacing: 0) {
459|439015|                    // Only show custom line numbers for legacy editor (Runestone has built-in line numbers)
460|3dcece|                    if lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor {
461|ca5e14|                        LineNumbersWithFolding(
462|a108d1|                            fileId: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName,
463|937d74|                            totalLines: totalLines,
464|0f00a6|                            currentLine: currentLineNumber,
465|d6742c|                            scrollOffset: scrollOffset,
466|9f4e9f|                            lineHeight: lineHeight,
467|76e9b6|                            requestedLineSelection: $requestedLineSelection,
468|0d74bf|                            foldingManager: foldingManager,
469|0acd63|                            theme: theme
470|63214b|                        )
471|c15397|                        .frame(width: 60)
472|3a838d|                        .background(theme.sidebarBackground.opacity(0.5))
473|c9717a|                    }
474|dd2193|                    
475|3f9dab|                    // Use Runestone for all files including JSON (has TreeSitter JSON support)
476|df925c|                    if false && tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") {
477|4229a0|                        // JSON Tree View disabled - using Runestone editor instead
478|daf992|                        JSONTreeView(data: text.data(using: .utf8) ?? Data())
479|f9d830|                            .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity)
480|96e3a5|                            .background(theme.editorBackground)
481|540066|                    } else {
482|082ddd|                        // Use Runestone for O(log n) performance, or legacy view as fallback
483|e44d33|                        Group {
484|31b1a0|                            if useRunestoneEditor {
485|40914b|                                RunestoneEditorView(
486|4496ad|                                    text: $text,
487|d36f79|                                    filename: tab.fileName,
488|deb430|                                    scrollOffset: $scrollOffset,
489|2b845b|                                    totalLines: $totalLines,
490|71c5eb|                                    currentLineNumber: $currentLineNumber,
491|872d17|                                    currentColumn: $currentColumn,
492|927813|                                    cursorIndex: $cursorIndex,
493|397368|                                    isActive: true,
494|b41e3e|                                    fontSize: editorCore.editorFontSize,
495|f39601|                                    onAcceptAutocomplete: {
496|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
497|028ab7|                                        var tempText = text
498|4f6f56|                                        var tempCursor = cursorIndex
499|93d70e|                                        autocomplete.commitCurrentSuggestion(into: &tempText, cursorPosition: &tempCursor)
500|28278a|                                        if tempText != text {
501|1a390a|                                            text = tempText
502|9a3612|                                            cursorIndex = tempCursor
503|55a703|                                            requestedCursorIndex = tempCursor
504|46924a|                                            showAutocomplete = false
505|e18645|                                            return true
506|eed1d8|                                        }
507|9818dc|                                        return false
508|3cc64b|                                    },
509|7ed733|                                    onDismissAutocomplete: {
510|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
511|fc38c2|                                        autocomplete.hideSuggestions()
512|579f59|                                        showAutocomplete = false
513|c09eb1|                                        return true
514|8ab74d|                                    }
515|58a90d|                                )
516|240f50|                            } else {
517|e97ddb|                                // Legacy SyntaxHighlightingTextView (fallback)
518|27eb3b|                                SyntaxHighlightingTextView(
519|4496ad|                                    text: $text,
520|d36f79|                                    filename: tab.fileName,
521|44ffa0|                                    scrollPosition: $scrollPosition,
522|deb430|                                    scrollOffset: $scrollOffset,
523|2b845b|                                    totalLines: $totalLines,
524|a9b405|                                    visibleLines: $visibleLines,
525|71c5eb|                                    currentLineNumber: $currentLineNumber,
526|872d17|                                    currentColumn: $currentColumn,
527|927813|                                    cursorIndex: $cursorIndex,
528|31e938|                                    lineHeight: $lineHeight,
529|397368|                                    isActive: true,
530|b41e3e|                                    fontSize: editorCore.editorFontSize,
531|193919|                                    requestedLineSelection: $requestedLineSelection,
532|70abf8|                                    requestedCursorIndex: $requestedCursorIndex,
533|f39601|                                    onAcceptAutocomplete: {
534|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
535|028ab7|                                        var tempText = text
536|4f6f56|                                        var tempCursor = cursorIndex
537|93d70e|                                        autocomplete.commitCurrentSuggestion(into: &tempText, cursorPosition: &tempCursor)
538|28278a|                                        if tempText != text {
539|1a390a|                                            text = tempText
540|9a3612|                                            cursorIndex = tempCursor
541|55a703|                                            requestedCursorIndex = tempCursor
542|46924a|                                            showAutocomplete = false
543|e18645|                                            return true
544|eed1d8|                                        }
545|9818dc|                                        return false
546|3cc64b|                                    },
547|7ed733|                                    onDismissAutocomplete: {
548|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
549|fc38c2|                                        autocomplete.hideSuggestions()
550|579f59|                                        showAutocomplete = false
551|c09eb1|                                        return true
552|8ab74d|                                    }
553|58a90d|                                )
554|89d40a|                            }
555|392b35|                        }
556|23a7d6|                        .onChange(of: text) { newValue in
557|c2cbfa|                            editorCore.updateActiveTabContent(newValue)
558|ca5c5e|                            editorCore.cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: currentLineNumber, column: currentColumn)
559|2d6cfb|                            autocomplete.updateSuggestions(for: newValue, cursorPosition: cursorIndex)
560|5db623|                            showAutocomplete = autocomplete.showSuggestions
561|f1e408|                            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: newValue, filePath: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
562|392b35|                        }
563|ae1be2|                        .onChange(of: cursorIndex) { newCursor in
564|017a4d|                            autocomplete.updateSuggestions(for: text, cursorPosition: newCursor)
565|5db623|                            showAutocomplete = autocomplete.showSuggestions
566|392b35|                        }
567|c9717a|                    }
568|dd2193|                    
569|0fbe94|                    if !tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") {
570|d0a712|                        MinimapView(
571|234a10|                            content: text,
572|d6742c|                            scrollOffset: scrollOffset,
573|9a8bd2|                            scrollViewHeight: geometry.size.height,
574|29b4a2|                            totalContentHeight: CGFloat(totalLines) * lineHeight,
575|83e3c8|                            onScrollRequested: { newOffset in
576|c2e825|                                // Minimap requested scroll - update editor position
577|d09b41|                                scrollOffset = newOffset
578|af41de|                                // Convert back from pixels to line number
579|6ad0f0|                                let newLine = Int(newOffset / max(lineHeight, 1))
580|ec5b45|                                scrollPosition = max(0, min(newLine, totalLines - 1))
581|89d40a|                            }
582|63214b|                        )
583|abeec0|                        .frame(width: 80)
584|c9717a|                    }
585|4e2d32|                }
586|3bc2db|                .background(theme.editorBackground)
587|adc83b|
588|cf06bf|                // Sticky Header Overlay (FEAT-040)
589|d5af46|                StickyHeaderView(
590|c24fd5|                    text: text,
591|f49254|                    currentLine: scrollPosition,
592|f7b7a6|                    theme: theme,
593|8e60a5|                    lineHeight: lineHeight,
594|9628b3|                    onSelect: { line in
595|df068a|                        requestedLineSelection = line
596|c9717a|                    }
597|6f642e|                )
598|a9b95c|                .padding(.leading, (lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor) ? 60 : 0)
599|a079a8|                .padding(.trailing, tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") ? 0 : 80)
600|adc83b|
601|0f82df|                // Inlay Hints Overlay (type hints, parameter names)
602|a8bcb0|                InlayHintsOverlay(
603|0fb212|                    code: text,
604|5f8f93|                    language: tab.language,
605|23acb0|                    scrollPosition: scrollPosition,
606|8e60a5|                    lineHeight: lineHeight,
607|0e3ffc|                    fontSize: editorCore.editorFontSize,
608|a63927|                    gutterWidth: (lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor) ? 60 : 0,
609|088baa|                    rightReservedWidth: tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") ? 0 : 80
610|6f642e|                )
611|a9b95c|                .padding(.leading, (lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor) ? 60 : 0)
612|a079a8|                .padding(.trailing, tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") ? 0 : 80)
613|8eef2d|                if showAutocomplete && !autocomplete.suggestionItems.isEmpty {
614|baeb3a|                    AutocompletePopup(
615|83a4b0|                        suggestions: autocomplete.suggestionItems,
616|53da2f|                        selectedIndex: autocomplete.selectedIndex,
617|5db55c|                        theme: theme
618|82606a|                    ) { index in
619|3a2861|                        autocomplete.selectedIndex = index
620|9c12a8|                        var tempText = text
621|f02eb3|                        var tempCursor = cursorIndex
622|7fdc0e|                        autocomplete.commitCurrentSuggestion(into: &tempText, cursorPosition: &tempCursor)
623|326231|                        if tempText != text {
624|d7f8a5|                            text = tempText
625|34aa29|                            cursorIndex = tempCursor
626|d3d820|                            requestedCursorIndex = tempCursor
627|392b35|                        }
628|2411d0|                        showAutocomplete = false
629|c9717a|                    }
630|58a34b|                    .offset(x: 70, y: CGFloat(currentLineNumber) * lineHeight)
631|4e2d32|                }
632|a7dc16|            }
633|5f3077|        }
634|5f3077|        }
635|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
636|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
637|92d865|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
638|5f3077|        }
639|9d97c0|        .onChange(of: tab.id) { _ in
640|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
641|92d865|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
642|5f3077|        }
643|d3345e|        .onChange(of: currentLineNumber) { line in
644|3384f8|            editorCore.cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: line, column: currentColumn)
645|5f3077|        }
646|588fd8|        .onChange(of: currentColumn) { col in
647|16524d|            editorCore.cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: currentLineNumber, column: col)
648|5f3077|        }
649|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
650|c916b3|            findViewModel.editorCore = editorCore
651|5f3077|        }
652|27e597|    }

657|dcdcdb|// MARK: - Line Numbers with Folding
658|adc83b|
659|c8dd5c|struct LineNumbersWithFolding: View {
660|5799da|    let fileId: String
661|cdda83|    let totalLines: Int
662|c75d8a|    let currentLine: Int
663|5b2177|    let scrollOffset: CGFloat
664|96ac71|    let lineHeight: CGFloat
665|86829b|    @Binding var requestedLineSelection: Int?
666|ec5c86|    @ObservedObject var foldingManager: CodeFoldingManager
667|c97289|    @ObservedObject private var debugManager = DebugManager.shared
668|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
669|adc83b|
670|834dc8|    @AppStorage("lineNumbersStyle") private var lineNumbersStyle: String = "on"
671|adc83b|
672|504e43|    var body: some View {
673|ca170c|        ScrollView(showsIndicators: false) {
674|829de3|            VStack(alignment: .trailing, spacing: 0) {
675|2e20ec|                // Match UITextView.textContainerInset.top (see SyntaxHighlightingTextView.swift)
676|551416|                // so line numbers stay vertically aligned with the first line of text.
677|227120|                ForEach(0..<totalLines, id: \.self) { lineIndex in
678|71bf03|                    if !foldingManager.isLineFolded(line: lineIndex) {
679|d3392c|                        HStack(spacing: 2) {
680|8eed40|                            Button(action: { debugManager.toggleBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) }) {
681|5f750e|                                Circle()
682|4cf57e|                                    .fill(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? Color.red : Color.clear)
683|5ded70|                                    .overlay(
684|6304cf|                                        Circle()
685|f93b39|                                            .stroke(Color.red.opacity(0.6), lineWidth: 1)
686|fe99c4|                                            .opacity(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? 0 : 0.25)
687|bf17fb|                                    )
688|d07523|                                    .frame(width: 10, height: 10)
689|da49b4|                                    .padding(.leading, 2)
690|89d40a|                            }
691|917e04|                            .buttonStyle(.plain)
692|746328|                            .frame(width: 14, height: lineHeight)
693|adc83b|
694|75451e|                            if foldingManager.isFoldable(line: lineIndex) {
695|6ae979|                                Button(action: { foldingManager.toggleFold(at: lineIndex) }) {
696|8689bb|                                    Image(systemName: foldingManager.foldRegions.first(where: { $0.startLine == lineIndex })?.isFolded == true ? "chevron.right" : "chevron.down")
697|e50a51|                                        .font(.system(size: 8))
698|856d81|                                        .foregroundColor(theme.lineNumber)
699|f83e05|                                }
700|31bef9|                                .buttonStyle(.plain)
701|23311c|                                .frame(width: 14, height: lineHeight)
702|240f50|                            } else {
703|b18c2d|                                Spacer().frame(width: 14)
704|89d40a|                            }
705|adc83b|
706|6798e8|                            Text(displayText(for: lineIndex))
707|f57164|                                .font(.system(size: 12, design: .monospaced))
708|525023|                                .foregroundColor(lineIndex + 1 == currentLine ? theme.lineNumberActive : theme.lineNumber)
709|5d10bc|                                .frame(height: lineHeight)
710|5cb7d4|                                .contentShape(Rectangle())
711|d56a2c|                                .onTapGesture {
712|c0cc45|                                    // FEAT-041: click line number selects entire line
713|6eaf3d|                                    requestedLineSelection = lineIndex
714|f83e05|                                }
715|392b35|                        }
716|729aac|                        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, alignment: .trailing)
717|539a79|                        .padding(.trailing, 4)
718|c9717a|                    }
719|4e2d32|                }
720|a7dc16|            }
721|5f0534|            .padding(.top, 8)
722|873abc|            .offset(y: -scrollOffset)
723|5f3077|        }
724|c059d6|        .scrollDisabled(true)
725|27e597|    }
726|adc83b|
727|46d3db|    private func displayText(for lineIndex: Int) -> String {
728|5d97cf|        switch lineNumbersStyle {
729|a6eb36|        case "relative":
730|e1ceac|            // VS Code-style: current line shows absolute, others show relative distance
731|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
732|44bb33|            if lineNumber == currentLine { return "\(lineNumber)" }
733|5e67df|            return "\(abs(lineNumber - currentLine))"
734|adc83b|
735|5040ac|        case "interval":
736|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
737|bc3fe3|            return (lineNumber == 1 || lineNumber % 5 == 0) ? "\(lineNumber)" : ""
738|adc83b|
739|520b7d|        default:
740|3880c0|            return "\(lineIndex + 1)"
741|5f3077|        }
742|27e597|    }
743|b31277|}
744|adc83b|
745|e3bdd2|// MARK: - Autocomplete Popup
746|adc83b|
747|b1d20a|struct AutocompletePopup: View {
748|5eb9d3|    let suggestions: [AutocompleteSuggestion]
749|79c1fc|    let selectedIndex: Int
750|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
751|6f35cf|    let onSelectIndex: (Int) -> Void
752|b4687f|    
753|504e43|    var body: some View {
754|0865e6|        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 0) {
755|a954be|            ForEach(suggestions.indices, id: \.self) { index in
756|ad513b|                let s = suggestions[index]
757|dbadc1|                HStack(spacing: 6) {
758|fcd45a|                    Image(systemName: icon(for: s.kind))
759|cdb0af|                        .font(.caption)
760|2e9202|                        .foregroundColor(color(for: s.kind))
761|288999|                    VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 1) {
762|3d1271|                        Text(s.displayText)
763|09bbe1|                            .font(.system(size: 12, design: .monospaced))
764|239e62|                            .foregroundColor(theme.editorForeground)
765|71c2b3|                        if s.insertText != s.displayText && !s.insertText.isEmpty {
766|53d416|                            Text(s.insertText)
767|87ab4e|                                .font(.system(size: 10, design: .monospaced))
768|32bc5b|                                .foregroundColor(theme.editorForeground.opacity(0.55))
769|a9b5f4|                                .lineLimit(1)
770|392b35|                        }
771|c9717a|                    }
772|dcd0bf|                    Spacer()
773|4e2d32|                }
774|41847e|                .padding(.horizontal, 8).padding(.vertical, 6)
775|e72d30|                .background(index == selectedIndex ? theme.selection : Color.clear)
776|1e8a31|                .contentShape(Rectangle())
777|eec06d|                .onTapGesture { onSelectIndex(index) }
778|a7dc16|            }
779|5f3077|        }
780|5260c9|        .frame(width: 260)
781|04ec17|        .background(theme.editorBackground)
782|097147|        .cornerRadius(6)
783|f64ce1|        .shadow(radius: 8)
784|27e597|    }
785|b4687f|    
786|ccd198|    private func icon(for kind: AutocompleteSuggestionKind) -> String {
787|01fe0f|        switch kind {
788|62a12d|        case .keyword: return "key.fill"
789|710dbd|        case .symbol: return "cube.fill"
790|d0a8ab|        case .stdlib: return "curlybraces"
791|c3ed81|        case .member: return "arrow.right.circle.fill"
792|5f3077|        }
793|27e597|    }
794|b4687f|    
795|126b1f|    private func color(for kind: AutocompleteSuggestionKind) -> Color {
796|01fe0f|        switch kind {
797|a51b30|        case .keyword: return .purple
798|8740a1|        case .symbol: return .blue
799|628567|        case .stdlib: return .orange
800|b8e5e8|        case .member: return .green
801|5f3077|        }
802|27e597|    }
803|b31277|}

872|e6f867|                    CommandRow(icon: "number", name: "Go to Line", shortcut: "⌘G") { editorCore.showGoToLine = true; editorCore.showCommandPalette = false }

874|a7dc16|            }
875|338a7e|        }.frame(width: 500, height: 400).background(Color(UIColor.systemBackground)).cornerRadius(12).shadow(radius: 20)

933|2d88cf|// MARK: - AI Assistant
934|adc83b|
935|5f57bf|struct IDEAIAssistant: View {
936|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
937|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
938|2855b6|    @State private var userInput = ""
939|9cbba7|    @State private var messages: [(id: UUID, role: String, content: String)] = [(UUID(), "assistant", "Hello! I'm your AI coding assistant. How can I help?")]
940|b4687f|    
941|504e43|    var body: some View {
942|94dd27|        VStack(spacing: 0) {
943|f49fd2|            HStack {
944|35e129|                Image(systemName: "brain").foregroundColor(.blue)
945|b6566c|                Text("AI Assistant").font(.headline).foregroundColor(theme.editorForeground)
946|a02350|                Spacer()
947|cc1153|                Button(action: { editorCore.showAIAssistant = false }) { Image(systemName: "xmark.circle.fill").foregroundColor(theme.editorForeground.opacity(0.5)) }
948|0facd0|            }.padding().background(theme.sidebarBackground)
949|3070d1|            
950|6b85db|            ScrollView {
951|df82e6|                LazyVStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 12) {
952|a5721a|                    ForEach(messages, id: \.id) { msg in
953|679877|                        HStack {
954|a85384|                            if msg.role == "user" { Spacer(minLength: 60) }
955|8b1fb9|                            Text(msg.content).padding(12).background(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 12).fill(msg.role == "user" ? Color.blue : theme.sidebarBackground)).foregroundColor(msg.role == "user" ? .white : theme.editorForeground)
956|b74ebb|                            if msg.role == "assistant" { Spacer(minLength: 60) }
957|392b35|                        }
958|c9717a|                    }
959|c5f15e|                }.padding()
960|744c4f|            }.background(theme.editorBackground)
961|3070d1|            
962|8574de|            HStack(spacing: 12) {
963|0e3711|                TextField("Ask about your code...", text: $userInput).textFieldStyle(.roundedBorder)
964|753afe|                Button(action: { sendMessage() }) { Image(systemName: "paperplane.fill").foregroundColor(userInput.isEmpty ? .gray : .blue) }.disabled(userInput.isEmpty)
965|0facd0|            }.padding().background(theme.sidebarBackground)
966|a8790d|        }.background(theme.editorBackground).cornerRadius(12).shadow(radius: 20)
967|27e597|    }
968|b4687f|    
969|beb964|    func sendMessage() {
970|29cfe7|        guard !userInput.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty else { return }
971|8a803f|        messages.append((UUID(), "user", userInput))
972|eac017|        let input = userInput
973|2c52ee|        userInput = ""
974|145a34|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.8) {
975|c7ba20|            messages.append((UUID(), "assistant", "I can help with '\(input)'! What specifically would you like to know?"))
976|5f3077|        }
977|27e597|    }
978|b31277|}

984|f4a6ee|// MARK: - Folder Picker
985|adc83b|
986|4842b2|struct IDEFolderPicker: UIViewControllerRepresentable {
987|a33870|    @ObservedObject var fileNavigator: FileSystemNavigator
988|10370b|    var onPick: ((URL) -> Void)?
989|b4687f|    
990|fc2de0|    init(fileNavigator: FileSystemNavigator, onPick: ((URL) -> Void)? = nil) {
991|237a4e|        self.fileNavigator = fileNavigator
992|3192b9|        self.onPick = onPick
993|27e597|    }

361|5a9b2c|            Image(systemName: fileIcon(for: name)).font(.caption).foregroundColor(fileColor(for: name))
362|0ffef7|            Text(name).font(.system(.caption)).lineLimit(1).foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground)
363|1e6289|            Spacer()
364|5f3077|        }
365|60e15e|        .padding(.vertical, 4)
366|55e29b|        .contentShape(Rectangle())
367|cf12c6|        .onTapGesture {
368|9f9063|            if let tab = editorCore.tabs.first(where: { $0.fileName == name }) {
369|166be5|                editorCore.selectTab(id: tab.id)
370|a7dc16|            }
371|5f3077|        }
372|27e597|    }
373|b31277|}
374|adc83b|
375|f3aab4|// MARK: - Tab Bar
376|adc83b|
377|24d9d9|struct IDETabBar: View {
378|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
379|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
380|b4687f|    
381|504e43|    var body: some View {
382|98ab70|        ScrollView(.horizontal, showsIndicators: false) {
383|3b7550|            HStack(spacing: 0) {
384|7512d8|                ForEach(editorCore.tabs) { tab in
385|4b4bd2|                    IDETabItem(tab: tab, isSelected: editorCore.activeTabId == tab.id, editorCore: editorCore, theme: theme)
386|4e2d32|                }
387|5de7cd|                Button(action: { editorCore.addTab() }) {
388|fd7d74|                    Image(systemName: "plus").font(.caption).foregroundColor(theme.tabInactiveForeground).padding(8)
389|4e2d32|                }
390|30b85f|            }.padding(.horizontal, 4)
391|962d70|        }.frame(height: 36).background(theme.tabBarBackground)
392|27e597|    }
393|b31277|}
394|adc83b|
395|68fbe9|struct IDETabItem: View {
396|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
397|055123|    let isSelected: Bool
398|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
399|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
400|b4687f|    
401|504e43|    var body: some View {
402|e1c66d|        HStack(spacing: 6) {
403|29528a|            Image(systemName: fileIcon(for: tab.fileName)).font(.caption).foregroundColor(fileColor(for: tab.fileName))
404|a9dd8d|            Text(tab.fileName).font(.system(size: 12)).lineLimit(1)
405|d555ba|                .foregroundColor(isSelected ? theme.tabActiveForeground : theme.tabInactiveForeground)
406|5029ae|            if tab.isUnsaved { Circle().fill(Color.orange).frame(width: 6, height: 6) }
407|6effb3|            Button(action: { editorCore.closeTab(id: tab.id) }) {
408|f4c72a|                Image(systemName: "xmark").font(.system(size: 9, weight: .medium))
409|041ce7|                    .foregroundColor(isSelected ? theme.tabActiveForeground.opacity(0.6) : theme.tabInactiveForeground)
410|a7dc16|            }
411|5f3077|        }
412|2da2e9|        .padding(.horizontal, 12).padding(.vertical, 6)
413|116b54|        .background(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4).fill(isSelected ? theme.tabActiveBackground : theme.tabInactiveBackground))
414|7a9052|        .onTapGesture { editorCore.selectTab(id: tab.id) }
415|27e597|    }
416|b31277|}

418|f95ca3|// MARK: - Editor with Syntax Highlighting + Autocomplete + Folding

422|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
423|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
424|b4687f|

426|952908|    private var useRunestoneEditor: Bool { FeatureFlags.useRunestoneEditor }
427|adc83b|
428|834dc8|    @AppStorage("lineNumbersStyle") private var lineNumbersStyle: String = "on"
429|eba335|    @State private var text: String = ""
430|4f0ac8|    @State private var scrollPosition: Int = 0
431|36da68|    @State private var scrollOffset: CGFloat = 0

433|bcf90b|    @State private var visibleLines: Int = 20

435|cc347a|    @State private var currentColumn: Int = 1

437|2c43f6|    @State private var lineHeight: CGFloat = 17
438|446eb9|    @State private var requestedCursorIndex: Int? = nil
439|5c2aeb|    @State private var requestedLineSelection: Int? = nil
440|adc83b|

442|4445ec|    @State private var showAutocomplete = false
443|a9aa54|    @ObservedObject private var foldingManager = CodeFoldingManager.shared
444|f453fc|    @StateObject private var findViewModel = FindViewModel()
445|b4687f|    
446|504e43|    var body: some View {
447|94dd27|        VStack(spacing: 0) {
448|8779dd|            // Find/Replace bar
449|2b2a70|            if editorCore.showSearch {
450|38cbe4|                FindReplaceView(viewModel: findViewModel)
451|b768ed|                    .background(theme.tabBarBackground)
452|a7dc16|            }
453|3070d1|            
454|b97232|            BreadcrumbsView(editorCore: editorCore, tab: tab)
455|3070d1|            
456|ca6f75|            GeometryReader { geometry in
457|e60c16|                ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
458|7a5371|                HStack(spacing: 0) {
459|439015|                    // Only show custom line numbers for legacy editor (Runestone has built-in line numbers)
460|3dcece|                    if lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor {
461|ca5e14|                        LineNumbersWithFolding(
462|a108d1|                            fileId: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName,
463|937d74|                            totalLines: totalLines,
464|0f00a6|                            currentLine: currentLineNumber,
465|d6742c|                            scrollOffset: scrollOffset,
466|9f4e9f|                            lineHeight: lineHeight,
467|76e9b6|                            requestedLineSelection: $requestedLineSelection,
468|0d74bf|                            foldingManager: foldingManager,
469|0acd63|                            theme: theme
470|63214b|                        )
471|c15397|                        .frame(width: 60)
472|3a838d|                        .background(theme.sidebarBackground.opacity(0.5))
473|c9717a|                    }
474|dd2193|                    
475|3f9dab|                    // Use Runestone for all files including JSON (has TreeSitter JSON support)
476|df925c|                    if false && tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") {
477|4229a0|                        // JSON Tree View disabled - using Runestone editor instead
478|daf992|                        JSONTreeView(data: text.data(using: .utf8) ?? Data())
479|f9d830|                            .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity)
480|96e3a5|                            .background(theme.editorBackground)
481|540066|                    } else {
482|082ddd|                        // Use Runestone for O(log n) performance, or legacy view as fallback
483|e44d33|                        Group {
484|31b1a0|                            if useRunestoneEditor {
485|40914b|                                RunestoneEditorView(
486|4496ad|                                    text: $text,
487|d36f79|                                    filename: tab.fileName,
488|deb430|                                    scrollOffset: $scrollOffset,
489|2b845b|                                    totalLines: $totalLines,
490|71c5eb|                                    currentLineNumber: $currentLineNumber,
491|872d17|                                    currentColumn: $currentColumn,
492|927813|                                    cursorIndex: $cursorIndex,
493|397368|                                    isActive: true,
494|b41e3e|                                    fontSize: editorCore.editorFontSize,
495|f39601|                                    onAcceptAutocomplete: {
496|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
497|028ab7|                                        var tempText = text
498|4f6f56|                                        var tempCursor = cursorIndex
499|93d70e|                                        autocomplete.commitCurrentSuggestion(into: &tempText, cursorPosition: &tempCursor)
500|28278a|                                        if tempText != text {
501|1a390a|                                            text = tempText
502|9a3612|                                            cursorIndex = tempCursor
503|55a703|                                            requestedCursorIndex = tempCursor
504|46924a|                                            showAutocomplete = false
505|e18645|                                            return true
506|eed1d8|                                        }
507|9818dc|                                        return false
508|3cc64b|                                    },
509|7ed733|                                    onDismissAutocomplete: {
510|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
511|fc38c2|                                        autocomplete.hideSuggestions()
512|579f59|                                        showAutocomplete = false
513|c09eb1|                                        return true
514|8ab74d|                                    }
515|58a90d|                                )
516|240f50|                            } else {
517|e97ddb|                                // Legacy SyntaxHighlightingTextView (fallback)
518|27eb3b|                                SyntaxHighlightingTextView(
519|4496ad|                                    text: $text,
520|d36f79|                                    filename: tab.fileName,
521|44ffa0|                                    scrollPosition: $scrollPosition,
522|deb430|                                    scrollOffset: $scrollOffset,
523|2b845b|                                    totalLines: $totalLines,
524|a9b405|                                    visibleLines: $visibleLines,
525|71c5eb|                                    currentLineNumber: $currentLineNumber,
526|872d17|                                    currentColumn: $currentColumn,
527|927813|                                    cursorIndex: $cursorIndex,
528|31e938|                                    lineHeight: $lineHeight,
529|397368|                                    isActive: true,
530|b41e3e|                                    fontSize: editorCore.editorFontSize,
531|193919|                                    requestedLineSelection: $requestedLineSelection,
532|70abf8|                                    requestedCursorIndex: $requestedCursorIndex,
533|f39601|                                    onAcceptAutocomplete: {
534|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
535|028ab7|                                        var tempText = text
536|4f6f56|                                        var tempCursor = cursorIndex
537|93d70e|                                        autocomplete.commitCurrentSuggestion(into: &tempText, cursorPosition: &tempCursor)
538|28278a|                                        if tempText != text {
539|1a390a|                                            text = tempText
540|9a3612|                                            cursorIndex = tempCursor
541|55a703|                                            requestedCursorIndex = tempCursor
542|46924a|                                            showAutocomplete = false
543|e18645|                                            return true
544|eed1d8|                                        }
545|9818dc|                                        return false
546|3cc64b|                                    },
547|7ed733|                                    onDismissAutocomplete: {
548|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
549|fc38c2|                                        autocomplete.hideSuggestions()
550|579f59|                                        showAutocomplete = false
551|c09eb1|                                        return true
552|8ab74d|                                    }
553|58a90d|                                )
554|89d40a|                            }
555|392b35|                        }
556|23a7d6|                        .onChange(of: text) { newValue in
557|c2cbfa|                            editorCore.updateActiveTabContent(newValue)
558|ca5c5e|                            editorCore.cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: currentLineNumber, column: currentColumn)
559|2d6cfb|                            autocomplete.updateSuggestions(for: newValue, cursorPosition: cursorIndex)
560|5db623|                            showAutocomplete = autocomplete.showSuggestions
561|f1e408|                            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: newValue, filePath: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
562|392b35|                        }
563|ae1be2|                        .onChange(of: cursorIndex) { newCursor in
564|017a4d|                            autocomplete.updateSuggestions(for: text, cursorPosition: newCursor)
565|5db623|                            showAutocomplete = autocomplete.showSuggestions
566|392b35|                        }
567|c9717a|                    }
568|dd2193|                    
569|0fbe94|                    if !tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") {
570|d0a712|                        MinimapView(
571|234a10|                            content: text,
572|d6742c|                            scrollOffset: scrollOffset,
573|9a8bd2|                            scrollViewHeight: geometry.size.height,
574|29b4a2|                            totalContentHeight: CGFloat(totalLines) * lineHeight,
575|83e3c8|                            onScrollRequested: { newOffset in
576|c2e825|                                // Minimap requested scroll - update editor position
577|d09b41|                                scrollOffset = newOffset
578|af41de|                                // Convert back from pixels to line number
579|6ad0f0|                                let newLine = Int(newOffset / max(lineHeight, 1))
580|ec5b45|                                scrollPosition = max(0, min(newLine, totalLines - 1))
581|89d40a|                            }
582|63214b|                        )
583|abeec0|                        .frame(width: 80)
584|c9717a|                    }
585|4e2d32|                }
586|3bc2db|                .background(theme.editorBackground)
587|adc83b|
588|cf06bf|                // Sticky Header Overlay (FEAT-040)
589|d5af46|                StickyHeaderView(
590|c24fd5|                    text: text,
591|f49254|                    currentLine: scrollPosition,
592|f7b7a6|                    theme: theme,
593|8e60a5|                    lineHeight: lineHeight,
594|9628b3|                    onSelect: { line in
595|df068a|                        requestedLineSelection = line
596|c9717a|                    }
597|6f642e|                )
598|a9b95c|                .padding(.leading, (lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor) ? 60 : 0)
599|a079a8|                .padding(.trailing, tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") ? 0 : 80)
600|adc83b|
601|0f82df|                // Inlay Hints Overlay (type hints, parameter names)
602|a8bcb0|                InlayHintsOverlay(
603|0fb212|                    code: text,
604|5f8f93|                    language: tab.language,
605|23acb0|                    scrollPosition: scrollPosition,
606|8e60a5|                    lineHeight: lineHeight,
607|0e3ffc|                    fontSize: editorCore.editorFontSize,
608|a63927|                    gutterWidth: (lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor) ? 60 : 0,
609|088baa|                    rightReservedWidth: tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") ? 0 : 80
610|6f642e|                )
611|a9b95c|                .padding(.leading, (lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor) ? 60 : 0)
612|a079a8|                .padding(.trailing, tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") ? 0 : 80)
613|8eef2d|                if showAutocomplete && !autocomplete.suggestionItems.isEmpty {
614|baeb3a|                    AutocompletePopup(
615|83a4b0|                        suggestions: autocomplete.suggestionItems,
616|53da2f|                        selectedIndex: autocomplete.selectedIndex,
617|5db55c|                        theme: theme
618|82606a|                    ) { index in
619|3a2861|                        autocomplete.selectedIndex = index
620|9c12a8|                        var tempText = text
621|f02eb3|                        var tempCursor = cursorIndex
622|7fdc0e|                        autocomplete.commitCurrentSuggestion(into: &tempText, cursorPosition: &tempCursor)
623|326231|                        if tempText != text {
624|d7f8a5|                            text = tempText
625|34aa29|                            cursorIndex = tempCursor
626|d3d820|                            requestedCursorIndex = tempCursor
627|392b35|                        }
628|2411d0|                        showAutocomplete = false
629|c9717a|                    }
630|58a34b|                    .offset(x: 70, y: CGFloat(currentLineNumber) * lineHeight)
631|4e2d32|                }
632|a7dc16|            }
633|5f3077|        }
634|5f3077|        }
635|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
636|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
637|92d865|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
638|5f3077|        }
639|9d97c0|        .onChange(of: tab.id) { _ in
640|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
641|92d865|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
642|5f3077|        }
643|d3345e|        .onChange(of: currentLineNumber) { line in
644|3384f8|            editorCore.cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: line, column: currentColumn)
645|5f3077|        }
646|588fd8|        .onChange(of: currentColumn) { col in
647|16524d|            editorCore.cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: currentLineNumber, column: col)
648|5f3077|        }
649|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
650|c916b3|            findViewModel.editorCore = editorCore
651|5f3077|        }
652|27e597|    }
653|b4687f|    
654|a19e38|    // Autocomplete insertion is handled by AutocompleteManager.acceptSuggestion(...)
655|b31277|}
656|adc83b|
657|dcdcdb|// MARK: - Line Numbers with Folding
658|adc83b|
659|c8dd5c|struct LineNumbersWithFolding: View {
660|5799da|    let fileId: String
661|cdda83|    let totalLines: Int
662|c75d8a|    let currentLine: Int
663|5b2177|    let scrollOffset: CGFloat
664|96ac71|    let lineHeight: CGFloat
665|86829b|    @Binding var requestedLineSelection: Int?
666|ec5c86|    @ObservedObject var foldingManager: CodeFoldingManager
667|c97289|    @ObservedObject private var debugManager = DebugManager.shared
668|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
669|adc83b|
670|834dc8|    @AppStorage("lineNumbersStyle") private var lineNumbersStyle: String = "on"
671|adc83b|
672|504e43|    var body: some View {
673|ca170c|        ScrollView(showsIndicators: false) {
674|829de3|            VStack(alignment: .trailing, spacing: 0) {
675|2e20ec|                // Match UITextView.textContainerInset.top (see SyntaxHighlightingTextView.swift)
676|551416|                // so line numbers stay vertically aligned with the first line of text.
677|227120|                ForEach(0..<totalLines, id: \.self) { lineIndex in
678|71bf03|                    if !foldingManager.isLineFolded(line: lineIndex) {
679|d3392c|                        HStack(spacing: 2) {
680|8eed40|                            Button(action: { debugManager.toggleBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) }) {
681|5f750e|                                Circle()
682|4cf57e|                                    .fill(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? Color.red : Color.clear)
683|5ded70|                                    .overlay(
684|6304cf|                                        Circle()
685|f93b39|                                            .stroke(Color.red.opacity(0.6), lineWidth: 1)
686|fe99c4|                                            .opacity(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? 0 : 0.25)
687|bf17fb|                                    )
688|d07523|                                    .frame(width: 10, height: 10)
689|da49b4|                                    .padding(.leading, 2)
690|89d40a|                            }
691|917e04|                            .buttonStyle(.plain)
692|746328|                            .frame(width: 14, height: lineHeight)
693|adc83b|
694|75451e|                            if foldingManager.isFoldable(line: lineIndex) {
695|6ae979|                                Button(action: { foldingManager.toggleFold(at: lineIndex) }) {
696|8689bb|                                    Image(systemName: foldingManager.foldRegions.first(where: { $0.startLine == lineIndex })?.isFolded == true ? "chevron.right" : "chevron.down")
697|e50a51|                                        .font(.system(size: 8))
698|856d81|                                        .foregroundColor(theme.lineNumber)
699|f83e05|                                }
700|31bef9|                                .buttonStyle(.plain)
701|23311c|                                .frame(width: 14, height: lineHeight)
702|240f50|                            } else {
703|b18c2d|                                Spacer().frame(width: 14)
704|89d40a|                            }
705|adc83b|
706|6798e8|                            Text(displayText(for: lineIndex))
707|f57164|                                .font(.system(size: 12, design: .monospaced))
708|525023|                                .foregroundColor(lineIndex + 1 == currentLine ? theme.lineNumberActive : theme.lineNumber)
709|5d10bc|                                .frame(height: lineHeight)
710|5cb7d4|                                .contentShape(Rectangle())
711|d56a2c|                                .onTapGesture {
712|c0cc45|                                    // FEAT-041: click line number selects entire line
713|6eaf3d|                                    requestedLineSelection = lineIndex
714|f83e05|                                }
715|392b35|                        }
716|729aac|                        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, alignment: .trailing)
717|539a79|                        .padding(.trailing, 4)
718|c9717a|                    }
719|4e2d32|                }
720|a7dc16|            }
721|5f0534|            .padding(.top, 8)
722|873abc|            .offset(y: -scrollOffset)
723|5f3077|        }
724|c059d6|        .scrollDisabled(true)
725|27e597|    }
726|adc83b|
727|46d3db|    private func displayText(for lineIndex: Int) -> String {
728|5d97cf|        switch lineNumbersStyle {
729|a6eb36|        case "relative":
730|e1ceac|            // VS Code-style: current line shows absolute, others show relative distance
731|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
732|44bb33|            if lineNumber == currentLine { return "\(lineNumber)" }
733|5e67df|            return "\(abs(lineNumber - currentLine))"
734|adc83b|
735|5040ac|        case "interval":
736|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
737|bc3fe3|            return (lineNumber == 1 || lineNumber % 5 == 0) ? "\(lineNumber)" : ""
738|adc83b|
739|520b7d|        default:
740|3880c0|            return "\(lineIndex + 1)"
741|5f3077|        }
742|27e597|    }
743|b31277|}
744|adc83b|
745|e3bdd2|// MARK: - Autocomplete Popup
746|adc83b|
747|b1d20a|struct AutocompletePopup: View {
748|5eb9d3|    let suggestions: [AutocompleteSuggestion]
749|79c1fc|    let selectedIndex: Int
750|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
751|6f35cf|    let onSelectIndex: (Int) -> Void
752|b4687f|    
753|504e43|    var body: some View {
754|0865e6|        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 0) {
755|a954be|            ForEach(suggestions.indices, id: \.self) { index in
756|ad513b|                let s = suggestions[index]
757|dbadc1|                HStack(spacing: 6) {
758|fcd45a|                    Image(systemName: icon(for: s.kind))
759|cdb0af|                        .font(.caption)
760|2e9202|                        .foregroundColor(color(for: s.kind))
761|288999|                    VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 1) {
762|3d1271|                        Text(s.displayText)
763|09bbe1|                            .font(.system(size: 12, design: .monospaced))
764|239e62|                            .foregroundColor(theme.editorForeground)
765|71c2b3|                        if s.insertText != s.displayText && !s.insertText.isEmpty {
766|53d416|                            Text(s.insertText)
767|87ab4e|                                .font(.system(size: 10, design: .monospaced))
768|32bc5b|                                .foregroundColor(theme.editorForeground.opacity(0.55))
769|a9b5f4|                                .lineLimit(1)
770|392b35|                        }
771|c9717a|                    }
772|dcd0bf|                    Spacer()
773|4e2d32|                }
774|41847e|                .padding(.horizontal, 8).padding(.vertical, 6)
775|e72d30|                .background(index == selectedIndex ? theme.selection : Color.clear)
776|1e8a31|                .contentShape(Rectangle())
777|eec06d|                .onTapGesture { onSelectIndex(index) }
778|a7dc16|            }
779|5f3077|        }
780|5260c9|        .frame(width: 260)
781|04ec17|        .background(theme.editorBackground)
782|097147|        .cornerRadius(6)
783|f64ce1|        .shadow(radius: 8)
784|27e597|    }
785|b4687f|    
786|ccd198|    private func icon(for kind: AutocompleteSuggestionKind) -> String {
787|01fe0f|        switch kind {
788|62a12d|        case .keyword: return "key.fill"
789|710dbd|        case .symbol: return "cube.fill"
790|d0a8ab|        case .stdlib: return "curlybraces"
791|c3ed81|        case .member: return "arrow.right.circle.fill"
792|5f3077|        }
793|27e597|    }
794|b4687f|    
795|126b1f|    private func color(for kind: AutocompleteSuggestionKind) -> Color {
796|01fe0f|        switch kind {
797|a51b30|        case .keyword: return .purple
798|8740a1|        case .symbol: return .blue
799|628567|        case .stdlib: return .orange
800|b8e5e8|        case .member: return .green
801|5f3077|        }
802|27e597|    }
803|b31277|}
804|adc83b|

972|eac017|        let input = userInput

132|dcdcf8|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ToggleTerminal"))) { _ in
133|9d7767|            showTerminal.toggle()
134|5f3077|        }
135|8c8974|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ToggleSidebar"))) { _ in
136|53cad1|            editorCore.toggleSidebar()
137|5f3077|        }
138|f012ad|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowQuickOpen"))) { _ in
139|386b9a|            editorCore.showQuickOpen = true
140|5f3077|        }
141|71e497|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowGoToSymbol"))) { _ in
142|e57e74|            editorCore.showGoToSymbol = true
143|5f3077|        }
144|61fe23|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowGoToLine"))) { _ in
145|8cc4b6|            editorCore.showGoToLine = true
146|5f3077|        }
147|7f8a05|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowAIAssistant"))) { _ in
148|0a68c1|            editorCore.showAIAssistant = true
149|5f3077|        }
150|809dfc|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("NewFile"))) { _ in
151|b60db2|            editorCore.addTab()
152|5f3077|        }
153|8d2162|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("SaveFile"))) { _ in
154|07f047|            editorCore.saveActiveTab()
155|5f3077|        }
156|d2a947|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("CloseTab"))) { _ in
157|c7a65d|            if let id = editorCore.activeTabId { editorCore.closeTab(id: id) }
158|5f3077|        }
159|a9ccd0|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ShowFind"))) { _ in
160|72e173|            editorCore.showSearch = true
161|5f3077|        }
162|c69ebf|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ZoomIn"))) { _ in
163|224c97|            editorCore.zoomIn()
164|5f3077|        }
165|7ff5a6|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("ZoomOut"))) { _ in
166|18c95d|            editorCore.zoomOut()
167|5f3077|        }
168|fb4855|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: NSNotification.Name("RunWithoutDebugging"))) { _ in
169|7ff579|            // Execute the current file using JSRunner for .js files
170|71e6ee|            if let activeTab = editorCore.activeTab {
171|a60731|                CodeExecutionService.shared.executeCurrentFile(
172|6332f1|                    fileName: activeTab.fileName,
173|d26039|                    content: activeTab.content
174|6f642e|                )
175|810960|                // Show the terminal/panel so user can see output
176|f34303|                showTerminal = true
177|a7dc16|            }
178|5f3077|        }
179|4a37b7|        .environmentObject(themeManager)
180|e3bdc6|        .environmentObject(editorCore)
181|27e597|    }
182|b4687f|    
183|231605|    private func finishOpeningWorkspace(_ url: URL) {
184|6dcdb7|        fileNavigator.loadFileTree(at: url)
185|d79336|        Task { @MainActor in
186|99e24e|            LaunchManager.shared.setWorkspaceRoot(url)
187|eccbe2|            GitManager.shared.setWorkingDirectory(url)
188|5f3077|        }
189|27e597|    }
190|b4687f|    
191|65a033|    private func updateWindowTitle() {
192|53ad0a|        if let activeTab = editorCore.activeTab {
193|ba8861|            let fileName = activeTab.fileName
194|b072a0|            let unsavedIndicator = activeTab.isUnsaved ? "● " : ""
195|741609|            windowTitle = "\(unsavedIndicator)\(fileName) - VS Code"
196|59ea7f|        } else if !editorCore.tabs.isEmpty {
197|fa7eae|            windowTitle = "VS Code"
198|b31999|        } else {
199|6c3506|            windowTitle = "Welcome - VS Code"
200|5f3077|        }
201|d6ed84|        
202|c675c5|        // Notify the app of the title change
203|63edcc|        NotificationCenter.default.post(
204|9251fc|            name: NSNotification.Name("WindowTitleDidChange"),
205|33f159|            object: nil,
206|332f22|            userInfo: ["title": windowTitle]
207|3143a4|        )
208|27e597|    }

210|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
211|0bbc6d|    private var sidebarContent: some View {
212|34711c|        switch selectedSidebarTab {
213|ab83f1|        case 0:
214|161f7c|            IDESidebarFiles(editorCore: editorCore, fileNavigator: fileNavigator, showFolderPicker: $showingFolderPicker, theme: theme)
215|032375|        case 1:
216|19e3bd|            SidebarSearchView(theme: theme)
217|12d44a|        case 2:
218|7fc3ae|            GitView()
219|1a2232|        case 3:
220|7116ef|            DebugView()
221|520b7d|        default:
222|161f7c|            IDESidebarFiles(editorCore: editorCore, fileNavigator: fileNavigator, showFolderPicker: $showingFolderPicker, theme: theme)
223|5f3077|        }
224|27e597|    }

254|b4687f|    
255|504e43|    var body: some View {
256|0865e6|        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 0) {
257|f49fd2|            HStack {
258|8f10b4|                Text("EXPLORER").font(.caption).fontWeight(.semibold).foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground.opacity(0.7))
259|a02350|                Spacer()
260|124c35|                Button(action: { showFolderPicker = true }) {
261|98d029|                    Image(systemName: "folder.badge.plus").font(.caption)
262|af1e18|                }.foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground.opacity(0.7))
263|035054|                Button(action: { editorCore.showFilePicker = true }) {

265|af1e18|                }.foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground.opacity(0.7))
266|eaa303|                if fileNavigator.fileTree != nil {
267|a67875|                    Button(action: { fileNavigator.refreshFileTree() }) {
268|7cfff4|                        Image(systemName: "arrow.clockwise").font(.caption)
269|681233|                    }.foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground.opacity(0.7))
270|4e2d32|                }
271|5cbd4e|            }.padding(.horizontal, 12).padding(.vertical, 8)
272|3070d1|            
273|6b85db|            ScrollView {
274|492557|                VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 2) {
275|5cce6c|                    if let tree = fileNavigator.fileTree {
276|46c9f4|                        FileTreeView(root: tree, fileNavigator: fileNavigator, editorCore: editorCore)
277|540066|                    } else {
278|b9326c|                        DemoFileTree(editorCore: editorCore, theme: theme)
279|c9717a|                    }
280|d407ec|                }.padding(.horizontal, 8)
281|a7dc16|            }
282|ea6339|        }.background(theme.sidebarBackground)
283|27e597|    }

286|2efb89|struct RealFileTreeView: View {
287|7345b3|    let node: FileTreeNode
288|ded86f|    let level: Int
289|a33870|    @ObservedObject var fileNavigator: FileSystemNavigator
290|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
291|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
292|b4687f|    
293|17d62f|    var isExpanded: Bool { fileNavigator.expandedPaths.contains(node.url.path) }
294|b4687f|    
295|504e43|    var body: some View {
296|ea9354|        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 2) {
297|37f526|            HStack(spacing: 4) {
298|a37387|                if node.isDirectory {
299|440597|                    Image(systemName: isExpanded ? "chevron.down" : "chevron.right")
300|8aec79|                        .font(.caption2).frame(width: 12)
301|0b3717|                        .foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground.opacity(0.6))
302|740862|                        .onTapGesture { fileNavigator.toggleExpanded(path: node.url.path) }
303|fdd0e2|                } else {
304|df77cf|                    Spacer().frame(width: 12)
305|4e2d32|                }
306|bf729b|                Image(systemName: node.isDirectory ? "folder.fill" : fileIcon(for: node.name))
307|8237e3|                    .font(.caption)
308|a7e98c|                    .foregroundColor(node.isDirectory ? .yellow : fileColor(for: node.name))
309|926090|                Text(node.name).font(.system(.caption)).lineLimit(1)
310|985367|                    .foregroundColor(theme.sidebarForeground)
311|a02350|                Spacer()
312|a7dc16|            }
313|f3d9fb|            .padding(.leading, CGFloat(level * 16)).padding(.vertical, 4)
314|68d57d|            .contentShape(Rectangle())
315|835ded|            .onTapGesture {
316|a37387|                if node.isDirectory {
317|8f26cf|                    fileNavigator.toggleExpanded(path: node.url.path)
318|fdd0e2|                } else {
319|13e765|                    editorCore.openFile(from: node.url)
320|4e2d32|                }
321|a7dc16|            }
322|3070d1|            
323|dd4b6d|            if isExpanded && node.isDirectory {
324|4a6742|                ForEach(node.children) { child in
325|8deaf6|                    RealFileTreeView(node: child, level: level + 1, fileNavigator: fileNavigator, editorCore: editorCore, theme: theme)
326|4e2d32|                }
327|a7dc16|            }
328|5f3077|        }
329|27e597|    }
330|b31277|}

395|68fbe9|struct IDETabItem: View {
396|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
397|055123|    let isSelected: Bool
398|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
399|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
400|b4687f|

404|a9dd8d|            Text(tab.fileName).font(.system(size: 12)).lineLimit(1)
405|d555ba|                .foregroundColor(isSelected ? theme.tabActiveForeground : theme.tabInactiveForeground)
406|5029ae|            if tab.isUnsaved { Circle().fill(Color.orange).frame(width: 6, height: 6) }
407|6effb3|            Button(action: { editorCore.closeTab(id: tab.id) }) {
408|f4c72a|                Image(systemName: "xmark").font(.system(size: 9, weight: .medium))

410|a7dc16|            }
411|5f3077|        }
412|2da2e9|        .padding(.horizontal, 12).padding(.vertical, 6)
413|116b54|        .background(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4).fill(isSelected ? theme.tabActiveBackground : theme.tabInactiveBackground))
414|7a9052|        .onTapGesture { editorCore.selectTab(id: tab.id) }
415|27e597|    }

418|f95ca3|// MARK: - Editor with Syntax Highlighting + Autocomplete + Folding
419|adc83b|
420|a178f9|struct IDEEditorView: View {
421|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
422|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
423|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
424|b4687f|    
425|129112|    /// Feature flag for Runestone editor - uses centralized FeatureFlags
426|952908|    private var useRunestoneEditor: Bool { FeatureFlags.useRunestoneEditor }
427|adc83b|
428|834dc8|    @AppStorage("lineNumbersStyle") private var lineNumbersStyle: String = "on"
429|eba335|    @State private var text: String = ""
430|4f0ac8|    @State private var scrollPosition: Int = 0
431|36da68|    @State private var scrollOffset: CGFloat = 0
432|d473fd|    @State private var totalLines: Int = 1
433|bcf90b|    @State private var visibleLines: Int = 20
434|9cb5e9|    @State private var currentLineNumber: Int = 1
435|cc347a|    @State private var currentColumn: Int = 1
436|eee196|    @State private var cursorIndex: Int = 0
437|2c43f6|    @State private var lineHeight: CGFloat = 17
438|446eb9|    @State private var requestedCursorIndex: Int? = nil
439|5c2aeb|    @State private var requestedLineSelection: Int? = nil
440|adc83b|
441|3977e1|    @StateObject private var autocomplete = AutocompleteManager()
442|4445ec|    @State private var showAutocomplete = false
443|a9aa54|    @ObservedObject private var foldingManager = CodeFoldingManager.shared
444|f453fc|    @StateObject private var findViewModel = FindViewModel()
445|b4687f|    
446|504e43|    var body: some View {
447|94dd27|        VStack(spacing: 0) {
448|8779dd|            // Find/Replace bar
449|2b2a70|            if editorCore.showSearch {
450|38cbe4|                FindReplaceView(viewModel: findViewModel)
451|b768ed|                    .background(theme.tabBarBackground)
452|a7dc16|            }
453|3070d1|            
454|b97232|            BreadcrumbsView(editorCore: editorCore, tab: tab)
455|3070d1|            
456|ca6f75|            GeometryReader { geometry in
457|e60c16|                ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
458|7a5371|                HStack(spacing: 0) {
459|439015|                    // Only show custom line numbers for legacy editor (Runestone has built-in line numbers)
460|3dcece|                    if lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor {
461|ca5e14|                        LineNumbersWithFolding(
462|a108d1|                            fileId: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName,
463|937d74|                            totalLines: totalLines,
464|0f00a6|                            currentLine: currentLineNumber,
465|d6742c|                            scrollOffset: scrollOffset,
466|9f4e9f|                            lineHeight: lineHeight,
467|76e9b6|                            requestedLineSelection: $requestedLineSelection,
468|0d74bf|                            foldingManager: foldingManager,
469|0acd63|                            theme: theme
470|63214b|                        )
471|c15397|                        .frame(width: 60)
472|3a838d|                        .background(theme.sidebarBackground.opacity(0.5))
473|c9717a|                    }
474|dd2193|                    
475|3f9dab|                    // Use Runestone for all files including JSON (has TreeSitter JSON support)
476|df925c|                    if false && tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") {
477|4229a0|                        // JSON Tree View disabled - using Runestone editor instead
478|daf992|                        JSONTreeView(data: text.data(using: .utf8) ?? Data())
479|f9d830|                            .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity)
480|96e3a5|                            .background(theme.editorBackground)
481|540066|                    } else {
482|082ddd|                        // Use Runestone for O(log n) performance, or legacy view as fallback
483|e44d33|                        Group {
484|31b1a0|                            if useRunestoneEditor {
485|40914b|                                RunestoneEditorView(
486|4496ad|                                    text: $text,
487|d36f79|                                    filename: tab.fileName,
488|deb430|                                    scrollOffset: $scrollOffset,
489|2b845b|                                    totalLines: $totalLines,
490|71c5eb|                                    currentLineNumber: $currentLineNumber,
491|872d17|                                    currentColumn: $currentColumn,
492|927813|                                    cursorIndex: $cursorIndex,
493|397368|                                    isActive: true,
494|b41e3e|                                    fontSize: editorCore.editorFontSize,
495|f39601|                                    onAcceptAutocomplete: {
496|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
497|028ab7|                                        var tempText = text
498|4f6f56|                                        var tempCursor = cursorIndex
499|93d70e|                                        autocomplete.commitCurrentSuggestion(into: &tempText, cursorPosition: &tempCursor)
500|28278a|                                        if tempText != text {
501|1a390a|                                            text = tempText
502|9a3612|                                            cursorIndex = tempCursor
503|55a703|                                            requestedCursorIndex = tempCursor
504|46924a|                                            showAutocomplete = false
505|e18645|                                            return true
506|eed1d8|                                        }
507|9818dc|                                        return false
508|3cc64b|                                    },
509|7ed733|                                    onDismissAutocomplete: {
510|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
511|fc38c2|                                        autocomplete.hideSuggestions()
512|579f59|                                        showAutocomplete = false
513|c09eb1|                                        return true
514|8ab74d|                                    }
515|58a90d|                                )
516|240f50|                            } else {
517|e97ddb|                                // Legacy SyntaxHighlightingTextView (fallback)
518|27eb3b|                                SyntaxHighlightingTextView(
519|4496ad|                                    text: $text,
520|d36f79|                                    filename: tab.fileName,
521|44ffa0|                                    scrollPosition: $scrollPosition,
522|deb430|                                    scrollOffset: $scrollOffset,
523|2b845b|                                    totalLines: $totalLines,
524|a9b405|                                    visibleLines: $visibleLines,
525|71c5eb|                                    currentLineNumber: $currentLineNumber,
526|872d17|                                    currentColumn: $currentColumn,
527|927813|                                    cursorIndex: $cursorIndex,
528|31e938|                                    lineHeight: $lineHeight,
529|397368|                                    isActive: true,
530|b41e3e|                                    fontSize: editorCore.editorFontSize,
531|193919|                                    requestedLineSelection: $requestedLineSelection,
532|70abf8|                                    requestedCursorIndex: $requestedCursorIndex,
533|f39601|                                    onAcceptAutocomplete: {
534|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
535|028ab7|                                        var tempText = text
536|4f6f56|                                        var tempCursor = cursorIndex
537|93d70e|                                        autocomplete.commitCurrentSuggestion(into: &tempText, cursorPosition: &tempCursor)
538|28278a|                                        if tempText != text {
539|1a390a|                                            text = tempText
540|9a3612|                                            cursorIndex = tempCursor
541|55a703|                                            requestedCursorIndex = tempCursor
542|46924a|                                            showAutocomplete = false
543|e18645|                                            return true
544|eed1d8|                                        }
545|9818dc|                                        return false
546|3cc64b|                                    },
547|7ed733|                                    onDismissAutocomplete: {
548|35fa15|                                        guard showAutocomplete else { return false }
549|fc38c2|                                        autocomplete.hideSuggestions()
550|579f59|                                        showAutocomplete = false
551|c09eb1|                                        return true
552|8ab74d|                                    }
553|58a90d|                                )
554|89d40a|                            }
555|392b35|                        }
556|23a7d6|                        .onChange(of: text) { newValue in
557|c2cbfa|                            editorCore.updateActiveTabContent(newValue)
558|ca5c5e|                            editorCore.cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: currentLineNumber, column: currentColumn)
559|2d6cfb|                            autocomplete.updateSuggestions(for: newValue, cursorPosition: cursorIndex)
560|5db623|                            showAutocomplete = autocomplete.showSuggestions
561|f1e408|                            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: newValue, filePath: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
562|392b35|                        }
563|ae1be2|                        .onChange(of: cursorIndex) { newCursor in
564|017a4d|                            autocomplete.updateSuggestions(for: text, cursorPosition: newCursor)
565|5db623|                            showAutocomplete = autocomplete.showSuggestions
566|392b35|                        }
567|c9717a|                    }
568|dd2193|                    
569|0fbe94|                    if !tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") {
570|d0a712|                        MinimapView(
571|234a10|                            content: text,
572|d6742c|                            scrollOffset: scrollOffset,
573|9a8bd2|                            scrollViewHeight: geometry.size.height,
574|29b4a2|                            totalContentHeight: CGFloat(totalLines) * lineHeight,
575|83e3c8|                            onScrollRequested: { newOffset in
576|c2e825|                                // Minimap requested scroll - update editor position
577|d09b41|                                scrollOffset = newOffset
578|af41de|                                // Convert back from pixels to line number
579|6ad0f0|                                let newLine = Int(newOffset / max(lineHeight, 1))
580|ec5b45|                                scrollPosition = max(0, min(newLine, totalLines - 1))
581|89d40a|                            }
582|63214b|                        )
583|abeec0|                        .frame(width: 80)
584|c9717a|                    }
585|4e2d32|                }
586|3bc2db|                .background(theme.editorBackground)
587|adc83b|
588|cf06bf|                // Sticky Header Overlay (FEAT-040)
589|d5af46|                StickyHeaderView(
590|c24fd5|                    text: text,
591|f49254|                    currentLine: scrollPosition,
592|f7b7a6|                    theme: theme,
593|8e60a5|                    lineHeight: lineHeight,
594|9628b3|                    onSelect: { line in
595|df068a|                        requestedLineSelection = line
596|c9717a|                    }
597|6f642e|                )
598|a9b95c|                .padding(.leading, (lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor) ? 60 : 0)
599|a079a8|                .padding(.trailing, tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") ? 0 : 80)
600|adc83b|
601|0f82df|                // Inlay Hints Overlay (type hints, parameter names)
602|a8bcb0|                InlayHintsOverlay(
603|0fb212|                    code: text,
604|5f8f93|                    language: tab.language,
605|23acb0|                    scrollPosition: scrollPosition,
606|8e60a5|                    lineHeight: lineHeight,
607|0e3ffc|                    fontSize: editorCore.editorFontSize,
608|a63927|                    gutterWidth: (lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor) ? 60 : 0,
609|088baa|                    rightReservedWidth: tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") ? 0 : 80
610|6f642e|                )
611|a9b95c|                .padding(.leading, (lineNumbersStyle != "off" && !useRunestoneEditor) ? 60 : 0)
612|a079a8|                .padding(.trailing, tab.fileName.hasSuffix(".json") ? 0 : 80)
613|8eef2d|                if showAutocomplete && !autocomplete.suggestionItems.isEmpty {
614|baeb3a|                    AutocompletePopup(
615|83a4b0|                        suggestions: autocomplete.suggestionItems,
616|53da2f|                        selectedIndex: autocomplete.selectedIndex,
617|5db55c|                        theme: theme
618|82606a|                    ) { index in
619|3a2861|                        autocomplete.selectedIndex = index
620|9c12a8|                        var tempText = text
621|f02eb3|                        var tempCursor = cursorIndex
622|7fdc0e|                        autocomplete.commitCurrentSuggestion(into: &tempText, cursorPosition: &tempCursor)
623|326231|                        if tempText != text {
624|d7f8a5|                            text = tempText
625|34aa29|                            cursorIndex = tempCursor
626|d3d820|                            requestedCursorIndex = tempCursor
627|392b35|                        }
628|2411d0|                        showAutocomplete = false
629|c9717a|                    }
630|58a34b|                    .offset(x: 70, y: CGFloat(currentLineNumber) * lineHeight)
631|4e2d32|                }
632|a7dc16|            }
633|5f3077|        }
634|5f3077|        }
635|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
636|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
637|92d865|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
638|5f3077|        }
639|9d97c0|        .onChange(of: tab.id) { _ in
640|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
641|92d865|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
642|5f3077|        }
643|d3345e|        .onChange(of: currentLineNumber) { line in
644|3384f8|            editorCore.cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: line, column: currentColumn)
645|5f3077|        }
646|588fd8|        .onChange(of: currentColumn) { col in
647|16524d|            editorCore.cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: currentLineNumber, column: col)
648|5f3077|        }
649|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
650|c916b3|            findViewModel.editorCore = editorCore
651|5f3077|        }
652|27e597|    }
